definition.en: The inner vitality of which we have so often spoken, and whose ways I have described, this inner vitality is the force which itself forms the physical universe, and without which no such manifestation would be possible.
definition.zh: 我们经常谈及的内在活力，我也描述过它的运作方式，这内在活力本身就是形成物质宇宙的力量，没有它，任何这样的显化都不可能存在。

definition.en: It is the vitality of the universe, and all universes, which causes the electrical reality, and the vitality of the universe, composing everything that is, cannot be touched. It is touch, but touch not as it is conceived of in your terms. This vitality is the most immediate and intimate aspect that composes the camouflage appearance within all fields.
definition.zh: 正是宇宙和所有宇宙的活力导致了电性实相，而构成一切万有的宇宙活力是无法被触摸的。它是触摸，但并非你们所理解的触摸。这活力是构成所有场域内伪装外观的最直接、最内在的面向。

definition.en: Inner vitality, materializing in any form whatsoever, at once multiplies the possibilities of further materialization. At the same time, because inner vitality is self-generating, only a minute fraction of inner vitality is needed to seed a whole universe.
definition.zh: 内在活力，以任何形式物质化时，会立即倍增进一步物质化的可能性。同时，由于内在活力是自我生成的，只需极小一部分内在活力就能播种整个宇宙。

definition.en: In the first place this vitality is self-generating and limitless, and we shall go into origins, reasons and so forth all in due time. Nevertheless as you do not deprive another of breath as you breathe, so you do not deprive another of the vitality of the universe simply by the act of using it yourself.
definition.zh: 首先，这活力是自我生成且无限的，我们将在适当时候探讨其起源、原因等。然而，正如你呼吸时不会剥夺他人的呼吸，你仅仅通过自己使用宇宙活力也不会剥夺他人的宇宙活力。

definition.en: The inner senses in other words are the means, the mental enzymes are the tools, and the vitality is the actual material that forms the universe as a whole, the apparent divisions within it, the apparent boundaries of the various divisions, and the diverse materials within each division.
definition.zh: 换言之，内在感官是方法，心灵酶是工具，而活力是实际的材料，它形成了整个宇宙、其中明显的划分、各种划分的明显边界，以及每个划分内的不同物质。

explanation:
活力是宇宙的本源能量，如同空气般无形却无处不在。它并非静态的实体，而是持续自我生成、自我转化的动态过程。所有物质形态——从你的身体到星辰——都是活力在不同场域中的伪装呈现。活力本身不可被直接触摸，但它是所有触觉、所有感知的根基。

活力永远无法完全物质化，因为每一次物质化尝试都会产生新的内在活力，形成永不完结的循环。这正是行动的本质：活力不断寻求以更多方式表达自身，却永远无法抵达终点。梦境状态是体验活力最直接的途径，因为那里自我设限的防御放松，活力得以自由流动。

你感到的每一个情绪、形成的每一个念头，都是活力在人格伪装下的具体表现。活力既塑造你的个性，又超越个性。它跨越时空，

quotes.text: We have, I believe, used the analogy of air, comparing it to the vitality of the universe in one of our previous sessions. As air is dispelled from the lungs in various forms and used and reused without any loss of power, strength or quantity, so is the vitality of which we speak used in different manners. So does it enter as one thing many times, and so does it emerge as something different many times; and so does it change shape and content, and so does it show many faces and yet never disappears. And as air seems invisible so does this vitality seem invisible, and yet like air this vitality gives shape to every object that you see, and so does it form every camouflage. Without it all camouflage would vanish. And so the ability to use this vitality well is as necessary to life as is the necessity to use air for breathing.
quotes.translation: 我相信，在之前的某次课程中，我们曾用空气作比喻，将之与宇宙的生命力相比较。正如空气以各种形式从肺部排出，被反复使用而丝毫不减其力量、强度或数量，我们所谈论的生命力也以不同方式被运用。它作为同一事物多次进入，又作为不同事物多次显现；它不断改变形态与内涵，展现无数面貌却永不消失。正如空气看似无形，这生命力也看似无形，但如同空气赋予你所见每一物体以形态，它也塑造着每一种幻相。没有它，所有幻相都将消散。因此，善用这生命力的能力之于生命，正如呼吸之于生存般不可或缺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The pieces to the puzzle are at mankind's fingertips, but he has put together an awkward, ill-fitting miniature model universe of a puzzle with which he is afraid to part. If the physical universe existed on a physical field only, indeed this would be the greatest miracle of all, for it would be impossible. The inner vitality of which we have so often spoken, and whose ways I have described, this inner vitality is the force which itself forms the physical universe, and without which no such manifestation would be possible. Yet this inner self, this inner vitality, is one of the main clues which man refuses to recognize, calling it an unreasonable assumption, but not willing to examine it for those characteristics which show it to be the most reasonable and logical of phenomena.
quotes.translation: 谜题的碎片就在人类指尖，但他却拼凑出一个笨拙扭曲、比例失调的微型宇宙模型，且不愿放手。若物质宇宙仅存在于物质场域，那确是最伟大的奇迹——因为那根本不可能。我们屡次提及的内在生命力，及其运作方式我已描述过，正是这内在生命力本身形成了物质宇宙，没有它便不可能有任何显化。然而这内在自体、这内在生命力，正是人类拒绝承认的主要线索之一，他们称之为不合理的假设，却不愿检视那些足以证明它是最合理、最合乎逻辑的现象的特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 此处同样存在向各个方向的推进，伴随某些贯穿一切、源自内在自体的识别性脉动。正如宇宙的生命力自行形成各活动场域的边界，生命力本身也染上各场域的色彩，在其中构成幻相模式；同样地，生命力以情绪形式呈现人格的幻相模式——即便这生命力同时为每个个体、每个意识塑造着情绪与人格——可被视为独立的活动场域；所有与活动场域相关的资料，同样适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entity should therefore not be thought of as completed. The electric universe, of which you know so little, is a reality, and yet it is also a symbol of another reality. For behind even this electrical universe there is a reality which cannot be explored in terms of speech; for all consciousness, while having an electric reality, has a reality beyond even this. It is the vitality of the universe, and all universes, which causes the electrical reality, and the vitality of the universe, composing everything that is, cannot be touched. It is touch, but touch not as it is conceived of in your terms. This vitality is the most immediate and intimate aspect that composes the camouflage appearance within all fields. And yet it is by far more than the camouflage.
quotes.translation: 因此，不应将存有视为已完成之物。你们所知甚少的电性宇宙是真实的，但它也是另一实相的表征。因为在这电性宇宙背后，存在着无法用言语探究的实相；所有意识虽具有电性实相，却拥有超越此层面的实相。正是宇宙及所有宇宙的生命力引发了电性实相，而构成万有的宇宙生命力本身不可触碰。它是触觉本身，却非你们所理解的触觉。这生命力是构成所有场域中幻相外观最直接、最亲密的面向，却又远非幻相所能涵盖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is always an imbalance here that may of itself be termed action. It cannot be perceived as any one thing, for it is a relationship and a dimension. It can be perceived most directly, and with less distortion, in the dream state. For here it is allowed the freedom of itself. Here you have also the inner vitality that has not been materialized within the realm of material camouflage. You have the tendency of this inner vitality to materialize, and its inability to completely do so. In the dream state the tendency for this vitality to materialize meets with little resistance. Action within actions result, without physical space. Distances appear and are experienced as such. Action is much less limited. Rather, action itself is not less limited, but you can experience action with less limitations, for the ego which erects such limitations lets down its guard.
quotes.translation: 此处始终存在一种可被称为"行动"的不平衡。它无法被感知为任何单一事物，因为它是关系与维度。在梦境状态中，它能以最少扭曲被最直接地感知。因为在此处，它得以享有自身的自由。在此你也能看到尚未在物质幻相领域内物质化的内在生命力。你看到这内在生命力趋向物质化，却又无法完全实现。在梦境状态中，这生命力物质化的倾向几乎遇不到阻力。行动中的行动在无物理空间处产生。距离显现并被如实体脸。行动所受限制大为减少。更准确地说，并非行动本身限制减少，而是你能以较少限制体验行动，因为设立这些限制的自我放下了戒备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action basically can never complete itself. Inner vitality, materializing in any form whatsoever, at once multiplies the possibilities of further materialization. At the same time, because inner vitality is self-generating, only a minute fraction of inner vitality is needed to seed a whole universe.
quotes.translation: 行动本质上永远无法完成自身。内在生命力以任何形式物质化时，会立即倍增进一步物质化的可能性。同时，由于内在生命力是自我生成的，仅需其极小部分便足以播种整个宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These three dilemmas represent three areas of reality within which inner reality, or inner vitality, can experience itself. And here we have also the reason, or one of the reasons why, inner vitality can never achieve complete materialization. The very action involved in vitality's attempt to materialize itself adds to the inner dimension of inner vitality.
quotes.translation: 这三个困境代表了内在实相或内在活力可以体验自身的三个实相领域。这里我们也看到了内在活力永远无法完全物质化的原因之一。活力试图物质化自身时所涉及的行动本身，反而增加了内在活力的内在维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have said before that you have lived many lives and that you can know these existences within yourself. I am not afraid that we shall be kicked out of our apartment. And I also am quite sure that as you grow to know Ruburt and as you grow to know me you will realize that there is a difference in our personalities and that indeed... when I tell you that my vitality spans both space and time, then you will know that I know whereof I am speaking... and that this vitality is your own... Then feel it within yourselves... Now it is being used simply to let you know of its existence... but realize that it is within you for you to use as you will... for your own good... and you (WL) are not powerless. I have no body... and I am not powerless... How, therefore, can you feel helpless... or you... or any of you?
quotes.translation: 我以前说过，你们活过许多世，并且可以在自己之内知晓这些存在。我不怕我们会从公寓里被赶出去。我也很确定，当你们逐渐认识鲁柏，逐渐认识我，你们会意识到我们人格之间的差异，而且确实……当我告诉你们，我的活力跨越时空，你们就会知道，我深知自己在说什么……而这活力就是你们自己的……那么，请在自己之内感受它……此刻它被用来让你们知晓它的存在……但请意识到，它就在你们之内，供你们随心使用……为了你们自己的益处……而你（WL）并非无力。我没有身体……我也并非无力……那么，你们怎么会感到无助……或者你……或者你们任何人呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: First I want to make certain that action is understood, insofar as we have discussed it. Action of the inner vitality of all reality. It seeks to utilize itself in as many ways as possible. Its action, its attempts at outward materialization, however, must result in the creation of new inner vitality, for this is the stuff of which it is composed. And this new inner vitality will then seek materialization, and so the cycle is never completed.
quotes.translation: 首先，我要确保行动被理解，就我们讨论过的范围而言。一切实相的内在活力的行动。它寻求以尽可能多的方式利用自身。然而，它的行动，它向外物质化的尝试，必然导致新内在活力的创造，因为这就是构成它的材料。而这新的内在活力随后会寻求物质化，如此循环永无止境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: [Many of] the flying saucer appearances come from [such] a plane, [one] that is much more advanced in technological sciences than earth at this time. However, this is still not a mental-science plane. Therefore the camouflage paraphernalia appears, more or less visible, to your own astonishment. Now, so strong is this tendency for vitality to change from one apparent form to another, that what you have here in your flying object is something that is actually, as you view it, not of your plane or of [whatever] plane of its origin ... The atoms and molecules that structurally compose the UFO, and which are themselves formed by vitality, are more or less aligned according to the pattern of its own territory. Now as the craft enters your plane a distortion occurs. Its actual structure is caught in a dilemma of form ... between transforming itself completely into earth's particular camouflage pattern, and retaining its original pattern. The earthly viewer attempts to correlate what he sees with what he supposedly knows or imagines possible in the universe.
quotes.translation: 许多飞碟的出现来自这样一个层面，一个在技术科学上远比地球当前先进的层面。然而，这仍然不是一个心灵科学的层面。因此，伪装道具出现，或多或少可见，令你们惊讶。现在，活力从一种显见形式转变为另一种形式的倾向如此强烈，以至于你们在这里的飞行物中看到的，实际上，就你们所见，既不属于你们的层面，也不属于它起源的层面……结构上构成UFO的原子和分子，它们本身由活力形成，或多或少根据其自身领域的模式排列。现在，当飞行器进入你们的层面时，会发生扭曲。它的实际结构陷入形式的困境……介于完全转化为地球特定的伪装模式和保留其原始模式之间。地球上的观察者试图将他所见与他所认为已知或想象中宇宙可能的事物关联起来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The flying saucer appearances come from a plane that is much more advanced in technological sciences than earth at this time. However this is still not a mental science plane. Therefore the camouflage paraphernalia appears, more or less visible, to your own astonishment. Now, so strong is this tendency for vitality to change from one apparent form to another, that what you have here in your flying saucers is something that is actually, as you view it, not of your plane nor of the plane of its origin. What happens is this. When the flying saucer as you prefer to call it starts out toward its destination, the atoms and molecules that structurally compose it, and which are themselves formed by vitality, are more or less aligned according to the pattern inflicted upon it in its own territory. Now as this enters your plane a distortion occurs. The actual structure of the craft is caught in a dilemma of form. It is caught between transforming itself completely into earth's particular camouflage pattern, and retaining its original pattern. The earthly viewer attempts to correlate what he sees with what he supposedly knows or imagines possible, in the little he knows of the universe.
quotes.translation: 飞碟的出现来自一个在技术科学上远比地球当前先进的层面。然而，这仍然不是一个心灵科学的层面。因此，伪装道具出现，或多或少可见，令你们惊讶。现在，活力从一种显见形式转变为另一种形式的倾向如此强烈，以至于你们在这里的飞碟中看到的，实际上，就你们所见，既不属于你们的层面，也不属于它起源的层面。实际情况是这样的。当你们所谓的飞碟开始向目的地进发时，结构上构成它的原子和分子，它们本身由活力形成，或多或少根据其自身领域施加的模式排列。现在，当它进入你们的层面时，会发生扭曲。飞行器的实际结构陷入形式的困境。它介于完全转化为地球特定的伪装模式和保留其原始模式之间。地球上的观察者试图将他所见与他所认为已知或想象中可能的事物关联起来，基于他对宇宙的有限了解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: "Your dog's illness was incipient. You could not have maintained his health for many long years in any case. I would like to make clear, of course, that animals certainly do have energy to maintain their own health, but this is strongly reinforced as a rule by the vitality of human beings to whom the animals are emotionally attached. The fact is, you were not able to give your dog that added emotional vitality at a time when he needed it most. There is no need to blame yourselves. It was beyond your control.
quotes.translation: "你们的狗的病是初期的。无论如何，你们也无法让它健康地活很多年。当然，我想说明的是，动物确实有能量维持自身健康，但这通常由与动物情感相连的人类的活力大大增强。事实是，在它最需要的时候，你们无法给予它那种额外的情感活力。没有必要自责。这超出了你们的控制。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This material is leading up to some future discussions, and the nature of action will be most important. Action is as valid whether the act is conscious and voluntary, or whether it occurs within a dream or within a thought. It is as much a reality either way. Again, it is not an outside force. It arises from within the inner vitality of which all camouflage is composed. To some degree it is a result of inner vitality's attempt to completely express itself in materializations, and its inability to do so.
quotes.translation: 这些材料是为未来的讨论做铺垫，行动的本质将至关重要。无论行动是有意识且自愿的，还是发生在梦境或思想中，它都同样有效。无论哪种方式，它都是同等真实的现实。再次强调，它并非外在力量。它源于内在活力，所有伪装都由这内在活力构成。在某种程度上，它是内在活力试图在物质化中完全表达自己却未能做到的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: My vitality is no more... no more than your own. I come to you from along way. But the essence of yourself is not of this place nor of this time. Now. I could keep up a demonstration such as this for hours... if only to let you realize that this is your own energy... that the energy that I show is your own... You have this energy and this vitality.
quotes.translation: 我的活力并不比……并不比你的更多。我从遥远之处来到你面前。但你的本质不属于此地，也不属于此刻。现在。我可以持续进行这样的演示数小时……只为让你明白这是你自己的能量……我所展现的能量正是你自己的……你拥有这种能量和活力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I simply want you to know that all kinds of energy and vitality are possible, that there are all kinds of possibilities for your own development, that there is energy available to you and you can tap it; and knowledge available that you can use. Such knowledge can be highly practical and in many instances, the dreamer is the most practical individual. You do not have to fear that this sort of experience will take you away from reality. It will show you a greater reality than you imagine.
quotes.translation: 我只想让你知道，各种能量和活力都是可能的，你的发展存在各种可能性，有能量可供你使用，你可以汲取它；还有知识可供你运用。这类知识可以非常实用，在许多情况下，做梦者是最务实的人。你不必担心这种体验会让你脱离现实。它会向你展示一个比你想象的更伟大的现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This talent for using energy to form unit patterns is elemental, not only on your plane but in all other planes. It involves drawing upon the basic vitality of the universe in using the inner senses, and actually pulling to oneself more and more of this under laying vitality. Lest this suggest images of grasp potbellied souls, gluttonously grabbing the stuff of the universe for themselves out of the mouths of the less ambitious, let me hasten to inform you that such is not the case.
quotes.translation: 这种运用能量形成单元模式的天赋是根本性的，不仅在你的层面，在所有其他层面也是如此。它涉及运用内在感官汲取宇宙的基本活力，并实际将越来越多的这种底层活力吸引到自身。为了避免这让人联想到大腹便便的灵魂，贪婪地从较不进取者口中抢夺宇宙物质，让我赶紧告诉你，情况并非如此。

quotes.text: The inner senses in other words are the means, the mental enzymes are the tools, and the vitality is the actual material that forms the universe as a whole, the apparent divisions within it, the apparent boundaries of the various divisions, and the diverse materials within each division. Again, the different materials within each division are only camouflages formed by the inner senses upon the material itself.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，内在感官是手段，精神酶是工具，而活力是构成整个宇宙的实际材料，包括宇宙内看似分化的部分、各分化的明显界限，以及每个分化内的多样物质。再次强调，每个分化内的不同物质只是内在感官在物质本身之上形成的伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, in your terms. I am dead! (Very loud.) How can you then be less lively? Why is it that I must tell you what vitality is... when, in your terms, I am a gray ghost that flits through the darkness of the night... a face that peers through second-story windows (in reference to SW's being frightened by a face that appeared at her window recently) and meets with no response but a sigh of horror. I visit my friends and they nearly faint. (SW apologized.)
quotes.translation: 现在，按你们的说法。我死了！（非常大声。）那你怎能不更有活力？为什么必须由我来告诉你什么是活力……而按你们的说法，我只是一个在黑夜中掠过的灰色幽灵……一张从二楼窗户窥视的脸（指SW最近被出现在她窗前的脸吓到），却只换来惊恐的叹息。我拜访朋友，他们几乎晕倒。（SW道歉。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The generic patterns set up certain organizations among themselves, maintaining direction over some cellular functions, and are closely allied with the movement and purifying agencies of the blood, and also with kidney function. Their vitality is influenced by the seasons, and runs in cycles of ten to fifteen days, followed by a more relaxed period. They are also connected with your ability to utter vowels, and they are themselves sensitive to sound.
quotes.translation: 一般模式在彼此之间建立了某些组织，维持着对部分细胞功能的掌控，并与血液的流动净化机制及肾功能紧密相连。它们的活力受季节影响，以十至十五天为周期运行，随后进入一段较为舒缓的时期。它们还与您发出元音的能力相关，且自身对声音敏感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In the first place this vitality is self-generating and limitless, and we shall go into origins, reasons and so forth all in due time. Nevertheless as you do not deprive another of breath as you breathe, so you do not deprive another of the vitality of the universe simply by the act of using it yourself.
quotes.translation: 首先，这种活力是自我生成且无限的，我们将在适当时机探讨其起源、缘由等。然而，正如您呼吸时不会剥夺他人的气息，您使用宇宙活力时也不会因自身行为而剥夺他人的那份活力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In actuality molecular structures and patterns are not rigid. They merely appear so from your viewpoint. Nor are they imposed from without. Vitality gives itself a shape and form. The form does not impose itself upon the vitality. Therefore it is not strange to consider the possibility of changing form at will, and this is exactly what happens basically in the universe.
quotes.translation: 实际上，分子结构与模式并非僵化不变。它们只是从您的视角看来如此。它们也并非由外部强加。活力赋予自身形状与形态，形态并非强加于活力之上。因此，考虑随意改变形态的可能性并不奇怪，而这正是宇宙中基本发生的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have said also that this feeling of vitality, and I prefer the term vitality, is moving and itself a part of the living stuff of the universe. Now as these wires pass seemingly from plane to plane they actually form the boundaries of each plane and become subject to the particular laws of the plane. Therefore they become subject to time on your plane. And they become subject to other laws, if not laws of time, on other planes.
quotes.translation: 我也曾说过，这种活力感——我偏爱"活力"一词——是流动的，且本身是宇宙生命物质的一部分。如今，这些"线"看似从一层平面穿越至另一层，实则构成了每层平面的边界，并受该平面特定法则的约束。因此，在您所在的层面，它们受制于时间；而在其他层面，即便不受时间法则约束，也受其他法则支配。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Remember here, however, that by action we do not necessarily mean motion as you perceive it. Action is the breath of inner vitality, of which all materializations of any kind are composed. It represents, again, the relationship between unexpressed inner vitality and materialized vitality.
quotes.translation: 但请记住，此处"行动"未必指您所感知的运动。行动是内在活力的呼吸，一切物质化形态皆由其构成。它再次代表了未表达的内在活力与物质化活力之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
quotes.translation: 情绪同样以电码形式编码，并具有独立的电性实相。在物质层面，它们兼具化学与电性特质。情绪的有效性与力量不可低估，因为它们以仅略染色彩的形式，代表了宇宙未经伪装的活力流经内在自我时的样貌。因此，情绪代表了这种活力在尚未被构建为伪装之前的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is a voluntary arrangement. The boy needs the additional vitality. I do not believe the boy will live to old age. The father loaned this vitality and helps the boy, knowing beforehand the boy's difficulty. The boy is unable to relate fully to physical reality. When the man called your father dies his energy will return to the self who is waiting. That self will then call back the energy which it has loaned to Ruth's son.
quotes.translation: 这是一种自愿的安排。这个男孩需要额外的活力。我不认为这个男孩能活到老年。父亲借出了这份活力并帮助这个男孩，事先知道男孩的困境。这个男孩无法完全适应物质实相。当你称为父亲的那个人去世时，他的能量将回到等待着的自体那里。那个自体随后将召回它借给露丝儿子的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The use of your private energy brings you into intimate relationship with your own source of power. Healing involves great natural aggressive thrusts of energy, growth, and the focus of vitality. The more powerless you feel, the less able you are to utilize your own healing abilities. You are then forced to project these outward upon a physician, a healer, or any outside agency. If your own belief in the physician "works" and you are cured of symptoms, you are physically relieved, and yet your own belief in yourself may be further infringed upon. If you are making no effective efforts to handle your own problems, then the symptoms will simply reappear in a new fashion, and the same process will be reinitiated. You may lose faith in your doctor while still retaining confidence in doctors as a whole, and run from one to another.
quotes.translation: 运用你私人的能量会让你与自己力量的源头建立亲密关系。疗愈涉及巨大的、自然的、进取性的能量冲击、成长以及活力的聚焦。你越感到无力，就越无法运用自己的疗愈能力。于是你被迫将这些能力投射到外在的医生、疗愈者或任何外在机构上。如果你对医生的信念"奏效"并且症状被治愈，你的身体得到了缓解，然而你对自己的信念可能进一步受到损害。如果你没有做出有效努力来处理自己的问题，那么症状只会以新的形式重新出现，同样的过程会再次启动。你可能对某个医生失去信心，同时仍然对整个医学界保持信心，于是从一个医生跑到另一个医生那里。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Planes can and do intermix without the knowledge of the inhabitants of the particular planes involved. I want to get away from the idea of a plane being a place. It may be in some cases but is not always. A plane may be a time. A plane, believe it or not, may be only one iota of vitality that seems to exist by itself. A plane is something apparently divided from the rest of the universe for a time and for a reason. A plane may cease to be. A plane may spring up where there was none. A plane is formed for entities as patterns for fulfillment on various levels. A plane is a climate conducive to the development of unique and particular capacities and achievements. A plane is an isolation of elements where each one is given the most possible space in which to function.
quotes.translation: 层面可以也确实会相互混合，而相关特定层面的居民对此毫不知情。我想摆脱层面是一个地方的概念。在某些情况下它可能是，但并非总是如此。一个层面可能是一个时间。信不信由你，一个层面可能只是似乎独立存在的一丁点活力。一个层面是暂时且出于某种原因与宇宙其他部分明显分离的东西。一个层面可能不再存在。一个层面可能在原本没有的地方突然出现。一个层面是为存有们形成的，作为在不同层面上实现圆满的模式。一个层面是一种有利于独特且特定能力与成就发展的氛围。一个层面是元素的隔离，其中每个元素都被给予尽可能大的运作空间。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your body is the physical mirror of your psychological state (quietly intent). It is powered by the energy of the universe. It actually springs into being in each moment. Your mind and your body come from the same source, from universal energy. You are powered with vitality. You must seek meaning in your lives. When you lose the sense of life's meaning, for whatever reason, this is reflected in your body. (Pause.) It is very difficult to separate all of this from the many connotations placed about disease, and I do not want the material to be misread (still intently). Cancer, for example, has become the symbol for the body's vulnerability, in current years -- the proof of man's susceptibility to the body. It is a disease that people have when they want to die -- when they are ashamed to admit that they want to die, because death seems to fly against sane behavior. If the species struggles to survive, then how can individuals want to die?
quotes.translation: 你的身体是你心理状态的物质镜像（安静而专注）。它由宇宙的能量驱动。它实际上在每一刻都瞬间生成。你的心智和你的身体来自同一个源头，来自宇宙能量。你被赋予活力。你必须在你的生活中寻求意义。当你因任何原因失去生命意义感时，这就会反映在你的身体上。（停顿。）很难将这一切与围绕疾病的各种含义区分开来，我不希望这些资料被误解（仍然专注地）。例如，癌症在近年来已成为身体脆弱性的象征——证明人类易受身体影响。这是一种当人们想死时患上的疾病——当他们羞于承认自己想死时，因为死亡似乎违背了理智的行为。如果物种挣扎着生存，那么个体怎么能想死呢？
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

As I quoted myself in the opening notes for the 840th session: "What is the real relationship between the host organism and disease?" See Session 840 itself, and certain parts of Session 841.

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 翻译内在资料的部分将其筛选下来通过潜意识，而潜意识对于在伪装层面上运作的当前人格来说，既是一个屏障也是一个门槛。我曾多次提到活力在接近并形成各个层面时如何变化。我曾说过潜意识的最上层包含个人记忆。在这些之下是种族记忆等等。事物并非像我描述的那样分层排列。但继续用必要的类比来说，在种族记忆的另一边（或对你而言在其之下），你不再存在于你的层面之内，而是用你这一其他自我意识部分的面孔向外注视着另一个层面。这一部分接收内在资料，与存有保持联系，其程度比你与你的梦境的联系更大，并且实际上指导着所有你认为要么是自动控制、要么是无意识控制的重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, he would have been highly frustrated had he continued. Not having enough blood was significant. His vitality was here strongly (words missed), but it was not in physical terms... literally he deprived himself of blood so that he could live on his own terms, and so that the mother and father could live in ways that they have forgotten. There was no witness there, and he expected his death to bring out your own strengths.
quotes.translation: 现在，如果他继续下去，他会感到极度挫败。没有足够的血液是重要的。他的活力在这里很强（词语遗漏），但不是在物质层面……字面上说，他剥夺了自己的血液，以便他能按自己的方式生活，并且让父母能以他们已经忘记的方式生活。那里没有见证者，他期望他的死亡能激发出你自己的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This fact is responsible to a large degree for your death shock, and for the more powerful birth shock, when the new personality awakes to the prisonlike clutch of rigid camouflage pattern. Other levels have different and sometimes severe problems of a different type. One of the basic purposes of existence on your plane is to enable the personality to focus powerfully and to form basic vitality into creative pattern. Sometimes the lesson is learned too well. However, it is extremely difficult for personalities to learn to organize vitality well enough to give it form, and therefore some troubles are to be expected.
quotes.translation: 这个事实在很大程度上导致了你们的死亡冲击，以及更强烈的出生冲击——当新的人格苏醒时，会感受到僵硬伪装模式如牢笼般的束缚。其他层面存在不同类型、有时相当严重的问题。你们层面存在的基本目的之一，是让人格能够强力聚焦，并将基本活力塑造成创造性的模式。有时这个功课学得太好了。然而，人格要学习将活力组织得足够好以赋予其形态是极其困难的，因此出现某些问题是意料之中的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: To some extent they serve as physical models. The vitality of creaturehood is demonstrated through the beauty, speed, elegance, and performance of the body itself. To some extent these people are perfectionists, and in their activities there are always hints of "super" achievement, as if even physically the species tries to go beyond itself. The members of this family actually serve to point out the unrealized capacity of the flesh -- even as, for example, great Sumari artists might give clues as to the artistic abilities inherent, but not used, in the species as a whole. The members of this group deal, then, in performance. They are physical doers. They are also lovers of beauty as it is corporally expressed.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，他们充当着物理模型。生物性的活力通过身体本身的美感、速度、优雅和表现力得以展现。在某种程度上，这些人是完美主义者，在他们的活动中总带有"超常"成就的暗示，仿佛即使在肉体层面，这个物种也在试图超越自身。这个家族的成员实际上起到了指出肉体未被开发的潜能的作用——就像伟大的苏马利艺术家可能会揭示整个物种内在但未被使用的艺术能力一样。这个群体的成员处理的是表现力。他们是身体力行者。他们也是肉体所表达的美感的爱好者。

quotes.text: Again, your elements, those that you know and those that you will discover, and the elements you will create, are only camouflages of the basic stuff or vitality, which you will not discover with your outer senses. Your scientists will discover that their tools are no longer adequate. Because man has such a sense of curiosity the scientists on your plane will be forced finally to use their own inner senses. Otherwise they will be dealing with camouflage only, and find themselves in a blind alley. Not because their eyes are closed, but because they are not using the right set of eyes. You will come no closer to knowledge of the fifth dimension until you use the inner senses as tools of perception.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你们的元素——那些你们已知的、将要发现的以及你们将创造的——都只是基本物质或活力的伪装，你们无法用外在感官发现它们。你们的科学家会发现他们的工具不再够用。因为人类具有如此强烈的好奇心，你们层面的科学家最终将被迫使用自己的内在感官。否则他们只会处理伪装，并发现自己走进了死胡同。不是因为他们的眼睛闭上了，而是因为他们没有使用正确的眼睛。除非你们将内在感官作为感知工具，否则你们无法更接近第五维度的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: "You wanted some affirmation of your body's vitality, of its resilience and recuperative energies. You also wanted some reassurance that you could operate as an artist as long as you chose in this life. You used the incident of the optometrist's notice to give yourself a very fine lesson, for in the back of your mind you did indeed worry and wonder that your eyes were becoming tired. Under usual circumstances, those "symptoms" would be interpreted as signs of difficulty. You discovered instead that the so-called symptoms are signs that your glasses have become too strong because your eyesight has not simply held its own, but most remarkably improved, and in a way this is medically demonstrable.
quotes.translation: "你希望确认你身体的活力、它的韧性和恢复能量。你也希望得到保证，你可以在这一生中随心所欲地以艺术家身份运作。你利用验光师通知这件事给自己上了很好的一课，因为在你的潜意识里，你确实担心并怀疑你的眼睛是否变得疲劳。在通常情况下，这些'症状'会被解释为困难的迹象。但你发现，所谓的症状恰恰表明你的眼镜度数已经过强，因为你的视力不仅没有下降，反而显著改善了，这在某种程度上是医学上可证明的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not involve projection. (Which we had wondered about this afternoon.) There were other issues, having to do with Ruburt's own mental characteristics. Now it is true that generally speaking, material of an emotional nature actually has a stronger vitality, and is easier to perceive. Beyond this however Ruburt has no (smile) love for detail, and will always use detail as a clue to see where it will lead him. He would not be content simply to give the details on the snatches of paper as you gave them. This is fairly automatic, this tendency, and the nature of his mental life. We use this, I hope to advantage, in our sessions in other ways, and I will have more to say concerning this.
quotes.translation: 这不涉及投射。（我们下午曾对此感到疑惑。）还有其它问题，与鲁柏自身的心理特征有关。诚然，一般来说，情感性质的素材实际上具有更强的活力，也更容易被感知。但除此之外，鲁柏（微笑）并不热爱细节，他总会把细节当作线索来引导自己走向某个方向。他不会满足于像你那样简单地给出纸片上的细节。这种倾向相当自动化，这是他精神生活的本质。我们在其他方面的课程中利用这一点（我希望是善加利用），关于这一点我还会说更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You think of space as an emptiness to be filled because on your plane you fill what you call space with camouflage patterns. And I repeat: instead true space, fifth dimensional space, is the vitality and stuff of all existence itself, vital and alive, from which all other existences are woven through means which I have outlined so far in a rather sketchy fashion. Even on your plane quality, which represents a kind of expansion, does not necessarily imply an expansion of space. The universe expands continually in a qualitative manner that has nothing to do with space as it is usually envisioned. And the expansion is more vivid and valid than I can possibly explain to you at this time.
quotes.translation: 你们认为空间是需要填充的空无，因为在你们的层面上，你们用伪装模式填充你们所谓的空间。我再次重申：真正的空间，第五维度的空间，是所有存在本身的活力和物质，充满生机与活力，所有其他存在都是通过我迄今粗略概述的方式从中编织而成。即使在你们的层面上，代表某种扩展的品质，也未必意味着空间的扩展。宇宙以一种与通常设想的空间无关的质的方式持续扩展。这种扩展比我此刻能向你们解释的更加生动和真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now again let me tell you, though the hour be late (quite loudly) and though Ruburt thinks that such demonstrations as these are hardly worth the effort (quite softly) and childish endeavors at best, I still want you to know, as I always want you to know, that my vitality is your own and that the energy that swings through this small frame is but an echo of the energy that swings through your own personality.
quotes.translation: 现在让我再次告诉你，尽管时间已晚（相当大声地），尽管鲁柏认为这样的演示根本不值得费心（相当轻柔地），充其量只是幼稚的尝试，我仍然想让你知道，正如我一直想让你知道的那样，我的活力就是你自己的活力，而贯穿这小小身躯的能量，不过是贯穿你自身人格能量的回响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: However it is your duty, and the duty of every individual insofar as it is within his power, to maintain his own psychic health and vitality; according to the strength of this vitality he will protect himself and others. Negative expectations, far from protecting either the individual or those with whom he comes in contact, will actually, to a greater or lesser degree, turn as destructive as any epidemic.
quotes.translation: 然而，维护自身的心理健康与活力，是每个人的责任，也是每个个体力所能及之事；根据这活力的强弱，他将保护自己和他人。负面期待非但不能保护个体或他所接触的人，反而会在某种程度上变得像任何流行病一样具有破坏性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now back to the point. When however sciences progress on various planes, then visitations become less accidental and more planned. However, since the inhabitants of each plane are bound by the materializations or materialized patterns of that plane, they bring this particular materialization pattern or camouflaged vitality pattern with them. Certain kinds of sciences cannot operate without it. When the inhabitants of a plane have learned mental science patterns, then they are to a great degree freed from the more regular camouflage patterns. This applies to a higher plane than mine, generally speaking, although my plane is further along in this science than your own.
quotes.translation: 现在回到正题。当科学在各个层面进步时，造访就变得不那么偶然，而更有计划性。然而，由于每个层面的居民都受限于该层面的物质化或物质化模式，他们便带着这种特定的物质化模式或伪装活力模式。没有它，某些科学就无法运作。当一个层面的居民学会了心智科学模式，他们就在很大程度上摆脱了更常规的伪装模式。一般来说，这适用于比我所在层面更高的层面，尽管我的层面在这方面比你们所在层面更先进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Instead, I am telling you that the universe is a good universe. It knows its own vitality, and that vitality is within you. You can encourage it freely. Your own nature is a good nature and you can trust it. Because something is difficult does not mean it is good.
quotes.translation: 相反，我告诉你宇宙是一个美好的宇宙。它知道自己的活力，而那活力就在你之内。你可以自由地鼓励它。你自身的本性是美好的，你可以信任它。因为某事困难，并不意味着它就是好的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each reader, however, should in one way or another sense his own vitality in a way quite new to him, and find avenues of expansion opening within himself of which he was earlier unaware. The very nature of this book, the method of its creation and delivery, in themselves should clearly point out the fact that human personality has far more abilities than those usually ascribed to it. By now you should understand that all personalities are not physically materialized. As this book was conceived and written by a nonphysical personality, and then made physical, so do each of you have access to greater abilities and methods of communication than those usually accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而，每位读者都应以某种方式，以一种对他而言全新的方式感知自己的活力，并找到内在扩展的途径，这些途径是他先前未曾察觉的。这本书的本质、其创作和传递的方法，本身就应清楚指出人类人格拥有比通常所赋予的更多能力。现在你应该明白，并非所有人格都是物质化的。正如这本书是由非物质的存有构想并书写，然后物质化，你们每个人也都能接触到比通常所接受的更强大的能力和沟通方式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The body maintains its vitality not only through the physical motion and agility that you perceive, but by microscopic agility, and actions within microseconds, that you do not perceive. There is as much motion, stimulation, and reaction in the interior bodily environment as the body meets through its encounters with the exterior environment. The body must now and then "flush its systems out," run through its repertoire, raise its temperature (pause), activate its hormonal actions more strongly. In such ways it keeps its system of immunities clear. That system operates always. To some extent, it is a way that the body distinguishes between self and nonself.
quotes.translation: 身体不仅通过你所感知的身体运动和敏捷性来维持其活力，还通过你所未感知的微观敏捷性和微秒内的动作来维持。身体内部环境中的运动、刺激和反应，与身体通过外部环境接触所遇到的同样多。身体必须不时地“冲洗其系统”，运行其全部程序，升高体温（停顿），更强烈地激活其荷尔蒙作用。通过这种方式，它保持其免疫系统的清晰。该系统始终在运作。在某种程度上，这是身体区分自我与非我的一种方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 若你按我所教的方式运用心理时间，你将直接亲身体验到实相的诸多面向，而我需用数页篇幅以间接的文字才能解释。所有存有本质上都是能量或活力的自意识部分。它们是自我生成的，无法以起始或终结的概念来思考。再次强调，正是你们那被幻相禁锢的数据，使你们认为万物皆有始有终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Part of the subconscious for example deals with camouflage, but the deeper portions are in direct contact with the basic vitality of the universe. When you or Ruburt wonder if this material comes from the subconscious, you often take it for granted that the subconscious is personal, exclusively dealing with matters of your egos' personal past. You are sometimes willing to concede that perhaps an element of racial memory might enter in. Racial memory is of course a conglomeration of camouflage data. The subconscious also contains the undistorted material of the mind, which is un-camouflaged, and which operates between planes, knowing no boundaries.
quotes.translation: 例如，潜意识的一部分处理幻相，但较深层的部分则与宇宙的基本活力直接相连。当你或鲁柏怀疑这些资料是否来自潜意识时，你们常理所当然地认为潜意识是个人性的，只处理你们自我个人过去的事务。你们有时愿意承认或许有某种种族记忆的元素介入。种族记忆当然是幻相数据的集合体。潜意识也包含心灵未经扭曲的素材，这些素材未经幻相包装，在层界间运作，不受界限限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 然而，为物质建构而实际汇聚原始活力的过程，并非真正自动，也非真正在无意识中进行。我曾提及的那个强大的自意识自我——你们人格所不知的自意识自我——这个面向内在实相世界的自我，是相当有意识地汲取存在本身的活力与素材。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: That is the meaning of spirituality; and as I have told you before, if I could I would do a merry dance about the room to show you that your vitality is not dependent upon a physical image. It is not dependent upon your youth, it is not dependent upon your body. It rings and sings through the universe, and through your entire personality. It is a sense of joy that makes all creativity probable.
quotes.translation: 这就是灵性的意义；正如我先前告诉你们的，若我能做到，我愿在房间里欢快起舞，向你们证明你们的活力并不依赖物质形象。它不依赖你们的青春，不依赖你们的身体。它贯穿宇宙回响歌唱，贯穿你们整个的人格。这是一种喜悦感，使一切创造力成为可能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your very physical life, then, implies a "source," a life out of which the physical one emerges, dash -- the implied, unspoken, unmaterialized, unsounded vitality that supplied the ingredients for the physical, bodily, molecular "alphabet." Your physical life therefore implies a nonphysical one. You take your particular "language" so for granted, and use it so effortlessly, that you give no thought at all to the fact that it implies other languages also, or that it gains its meaning because of inner assumptions that are never spoken, or by the use of pauses in which no sounds are made. You live your lives in the same fashion.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们物质生命本身暗示着一个"源头"，一个从中涌现物质生命的生命——那隐含的、未言明的、未物质化的、未发声的活力，为物质、身体、分子的"字母表"提供了成分。因此，你们的物质生命暗示着一个非物质生命。你们如此理所当然地接受自己特定的"语言"，毫不费力地使用它，以至于完全不曾想到它同时也暗示着其他语言，或它的意义来自于从未说出的内在假设，或来自于无声的停顿。你们以同样的方式生活着。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I cannot simply appear in your midst, or make myself known in my own form. I have explained camouflage patterns to you, I have explained the way the vitality or stuff of the universe changes from plane to plane. Then why do you find it strange that at your end I must to some degree change essence, and find a point of entry, which happens to be Ruburt's subconscious? It has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I have described the effects of entry into your plane of the so-called flying saucers, and my entry into your plane is something of the same.
quotes.translation: 我无法简单地出现在你们中间，或以我自己的形态显明自己。我已向你们解释过幻相模式，解释过宇宙的活力或素材如何从一层界转变为另一层界。那么，为何你们会觉得奇怪：在你们这一端，我必须在某种程度上改变本质，找到一个切入点——恰好是鲁柏的潜意识？它有足够的幻相模式让我建立联系，但又不会多到将我扭曲得面目全非。我曾描述过所谓飞碟进入你们层界的效果，而我进入你们层界的过程也颇为相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All of this happens through the window of your present. In terms of energy, again, the vitality of your entity impinging into three-dimensional reality forms a particle that is your present being. But this particle is also deflected away from the earth in a rhythmic pattern. The same happens to other portions of your self at other points in the space-time continuum, but at certain intervals you meet, so to speak. Each of your "presents" becomes charged, filled with potentiality; and your entity, itself conscious energy, is also enriched by your various experiences, by the combined and magnified power of its own "past."
quotes.translation: 这一切都通过你当下的窗口发生。就能量而言，你实体的活力冲击三维实相，形成一个粒子，即你当下的存在。但这个粒子也以有节奏的模式偏离地球。同样的情况也发生在时空连续体中其他点上的你自身其他部分，但在某些间隔中，你们可以说会相遇。你的每个"当下"都变得充满电荷，充满潜能；而你的实体——它本身就是有意识的能量——也因你各种经验、因它自身"过去"的联合与放大的力量而更加丰富。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: On your particular kind of culturally organized grouping the camouflage is necessarily strong, and the outside senses correspondingly vivid. This of course is bound to block some inner data. At the same time it is the inner vitality which creates the camouflage to begin with. Joseph was right when he spoke of entities creating stages upon which to act out their problems. The point of course being that once the play begins the actors are so completely immersed in their roles that they forget that they themselves wrote the play, constructed the sets, or are even acting. The reason for this is rather apparent.
quotes.translation: 在你特定文化组织的社会群体中，伪装必然强烈，外在感官也相应地鲜明。这当然会阻挡一些内在资料。但同时，正是内在活力首先创造了伪装。当约瑟夫谈到实体创造舞台来演出他们的问题时，他是对的。当然关键在于，一旦戏剧开始，演员们如此完全沉浸于角色中，以至于忘记他们自己写了剧本、搭建了布景，甚至忘记了他们是在演戏。其原因相当明显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Psychological vitality is a transformation of energy, again, into terms not recognizable by the outer senses. There are literally countless such manifestations of energy with which the outer senses are not familiar. The inner senses, to the contrary, are well aware of these manifestations, and of the existence of an open infinite system, within which they only are equipped to function.
quotes.translation: 心理活力是能量的转化，再次转化为外在感官无法识别的形式。实际上有无数种这样的能量显现，外在感官并不熟悉它们。相反，内在感官却深知这些显现，并知晓一个开放无限系统的存在——内在感官只适合在这个系统内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It was a very good one. He used the term unconscious; and it is legitimate. For the basic earth that gives you sustenance is formed from your own vitality. When you look at the state of your world therefore, as a sign of man's condition, then also consider the stability, in your terms, and the bounty, that is also a sign of inner vitality. And this sustains you regardless of your wars.
quotes.translation: 这是一个很好的说法。他用了"无意识"这个术语，这是合理的。因为给予你滋养的基本地球是由你自己的活力形成的。因此，当你观察世界的状态作为人类状况的迹象时，也请考虑——用你的说法——稳定性和丰饶，这也是内在活力的迹象。无论你们如何战争，这都支撑着你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is only the inner senses which will give you any evidence at all of the basic nature of life itself. Since very often the vitality or stuff of the universe seems as innocuous as air might seem to you, then look for what you do not see. Explore places that appear empty, for they are full. Look between events. What you see clearly with your outer senses is camouflage. I am not suggesting that you take everything on faith, nothing of the sort. I am saying that what seems vacant lacks camouflage, and therefore if this is explored it will yield evidence. I hope I have not carried you too far too fast.
quotes.translation: 只有内在感官才能给你任何关于生命本身基本性质的证据。既然宇宙的活力或素材常常像空气对你那样看似无害，那么就去寻找你看不见的东西。探索看似空旷的地方，因为它们充满了东西。在事件之间观察。你用外在感官清楚看到的是伪装。我不是建议你凡事只凭信心，绝非如此。我是说，看似空无的东西缺乏伪装，因此如果探索它，就会产生证据。我希望我没有带你走得太快太远。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now as you will see, all creatures, regardless of their degree, can and do choose, within their spheres of reality, those sensations that they will experience--but to one extent or another (underlined) all sensations are felt. We will later discuss the part of the mind and its interpretation, for example, of painful stimuli, but I want to make the point that those attracted to physical life are first and foremost tasters of sensation. Outside of that, basically, there are all kinds of mental distinctions made [among] stimuli. The body is made to react. It is made to feel life and vitality by reacting to an environment that is not itself, by encountering what you might call natural stress. The body maintains its equilibrium by reacting against gravity, by coming in contact with other bodies, by changing its own sensations, by glorifying in the balance between balance and off-balance.
quotes.translation: 现在你会看到，所有生物，无论其程度如何，都能且确实在其实相范围内选择他们将体验的感觉——但在某种程度上（下划线强调）所有感觉都被感受到。我们稍后将讨论心灵及其对痛苦刺激等解释的作用，但我想指出，那些被吸引到物质生命的人首先是感觉的品尝者。基本上，除此之外，刺激之间还有各种心智上的区分。身体被设计来反应。它通过接触并非自身的环境、通过遭遇你所谓的自然压力来感受生命和活力。身体通过对抗重力、通过接触其他物体、通过改变自身感觉、通过在平衡与失衡之间的平衡中荣耀来维持其平衡。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These are points, therefore, of concentrated energy. The subordinate points are far more common, and practically speaking, affect your daily concerns. There are better places than others to build houses or structures -- points where health and vitality are strengthened, where, other things being equal, plants will grow and flourish and where all beneficial conditions seem to meet.
quotes.translation: 因此，这些是能量集中的点。次要的点则更为常见，实际上影响着你的日常事务。有些地点比其他地方更适合建造房屋或结构——在这些点上，健康与活力得以增强，在其他条件相同的情况下，植物会生长繁茂，所有有益的条件似乎都汇聚于此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The camouflage patterns of course do belong to the inner world also, since the camouflages themselves are formed from the vitality stuff of the universe by mental enzymes, which have a chemical reaction on your plane. The reaction of course being a distortion. That is, any camouflage pattern at all is bound to be a distortion, in a sense, of vitality forced into a particular form.
quotes.translation: 伪装模式当然也属于内在世界，因为伪装本身是由宇宙的活力材料通过心灵酵素形成的，这些酵素在你的层面上产生化学反应。这种反应当然是一种扭曲。也就是说，任何伪装模式在某种意义上都必然是活力被强行塑造成特定形式后的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When you paint the land, do so thinking in terms having to do with its past as well as present and future. Its inner development that has resulted in its present form, the energy behind the form. Remember in your painting the relationship of one object to another, not in terms of space necessarily, the interrelationship of the vitality that forms the objects; the vibrating always changing reality within, say, the skin of the apple or the orange, the quite living consciousness within the molecules that make up what seems to be the solid surface of the fruits' skin.
quotes.translation: 当你描绘大地时，请思考其过去、现在与未来。思考导致其当前形态的内在发展，以及形态背后的能量。在你的画作中，记住一个物体与另一个物体的关系——不一定是空间上的关系，而是构成物体的活力之间的相互关系；例如，苹果或橙子表皮内部那不断振动的、永远变化的实相，以及构成看似坚实的水果表皮分子的分子内那充满生机的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your light is a mental enzyme tipped me off that you were ready for this discussion. Needless to say solidified vitality and mental enzymes are dependent upon each other in many ways. The enzyme part of our little equation therefore permits vitality to operate successfully under diverse mental and physical situations, and to form the basis for each particular plane. （Pause.）
quotes.translation: 你的光是一种心灵酵素，它提示我你已准备好进行这次讨论。无需赘言，固化的活力与心灵酵素在许多方面相互依存。因此，我们这个小方程式中的酵素部分，使得活力能够在各种不同的心智与物质情境下成功运作，并为每个特定层面奠定基础。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Once more, action is not a force outside that acts upon matter. Action is, instead, the inside vitality of the inner universe. It is the dilemma between inner vitality's desire and impetus to completely materialize itself, and its inability to completely do so. This was also discussed briefly in sessions dealing with the first appearance of matter within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，行动并非作用于物质的外在力量。相反，行动是内在宇宙的内在活力。它是内在活力想要并推动完全物质化自身的欲望，与其无法完全做到这一点之间的困境。这在讨论物质首次出现在物理场中的章节中也有简要提及。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now at times I will be using the term "camouflage," referring to the physical world to which the outer ego relates, for physical form is one of the camouflages that reality adopts. The camouflage is real, and yet there is a much greater reality within it -- the vitality that gave it form. Your physical senses then allow you to perceive this camouflage, for they are attuned to it in a highly specialized manner. But to sense the reality within the form requires a different sort of attention, and more delicate manipulations than the physical senses provide.
quotes.translation: 现在，有时我会使用“伪装”一词，指代外在自我所关联的物理世界，因为物理形态是实相所采用的伪装之一。伪装是真实的，但其内部存在着更大的实相——赋予它形态的活力。你的物理感官因此允许你感知这种伪装，因为它们以高度专门化的方式与之调谐。但要感知形态内部的实相，则需要一种不同于物理感官所提供的注意力，以及更为精妙的操作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The cells and molecules, forming their psychic gestalt into a particular human physical structure, are separated from what you might call the outer environment, and yet they are also connected to the outer environment more than they are separated from it. It is the inner ego, and the inner vitality and the inner ego's determination, along with the cooperation of all the cells that compose the physical body, that enables such a particular structure as the human body to exist as a separate construction, and to maintain the necessary sense of identity.
quotes.translation: 细胞与分子将它们的心理完形塑造成特定的人类身体结构，它们与你所谓的外在环境分离，然而它们与外在环境的联系其实多于分离。正是内在自我、内在活力与内在自我的决心，加上构成肉体的所有细胞的合作，才使得人体这样的特定结构能够作为独立的构造存在，并维持必要的身份感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Power does not basically imply superiority over. There is the power of love, for example, and the power to love. Both imply great action and vitality, and an aggressive thrust that has nothing to do with violence. Yet many people have physical symptoms or suffer unpleasant situations because they are afraid to utilize their own power of action, and equate power with aggression -- meaning violence. (See the 634th session in Chapter Eight.)
quotes.translation: 力量本质上并不意味优越于他人。例如，有爱的力量，也有去爱的力量。两者都意味着伟大的行动与活力，以及一种与暴力无关的进取性推力。然而许多人出现身体症状或遭遇不愉快情境，是因为他们害怕运用自身行动的力量，并将力量等同于攻击性——即暴力。（参见第八章第634节。）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The health and psychic condition of an individual is not primarily determined by the ego, however. It is only when the ego is allowed too much power that the individual is deprived of much of the inner vitality of the whole self. For the ego is acquainted with only its role. It can find refreshment only within the limitations of the reality which it was formed to meet; and when it looks about with the best of intentions and sees disasters and terrors, it does not know that these others also play their roles, and that the roles are temporary.
quotes.translation: 然而，个体的健康与心理状态并非主要由自我决定。只有当自我被允许拥有过多力量时，个体才会被剥夺整体自我的大量内在活力。因为自我只熟悉自己的角色。它只能在它被形成以应对的现实限制内找到更新；当它怀着最佳意图环顾四周，看到灾难与恐惧时，它不知道这些也扮演着各自的角色，而且这些角色是暂时的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This can show you what was missing from your home station if you know how to read the clues. You form your home station according to your beliefs. If you firmly believe, again, that sex is wrong, then your home station may involve you in a life "programming" in which you constantly try to deny the vitality of the flesh. The sight of a nude body might upset you. You might undress in the dark, or think, if you are married, of the sexual act of intercourse as dirty. If you are a man, you might be ashamed of what you consider to be your need.
quotes.translation: 如果你知道如何解读线索，这能向你展示你的家庭站缺失了什么。你根据你的信念形成你的家庭站。如果你再次坚信性是错误的，那么你的家庭站可能会让你陷入一种生活"编程"，在其中你不断试图否认肉体的活力。看到裸体可能会让你不安。你可能会在黑暗中脱衣，或者如果你已婚，会认为性交行为是肮脏的。如果你是男性，你可能会为自己认为的需求感到羞耻。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The settings in your physical environment, the sometimes lovely paraphernalia, the physical aspects of life as you know it, are all camouflages, and so I call your physical reality a camouflage. Yet these camouflages are composed of the vitality of the universe. The rocks and stones and mountains and earth are living camouflage, interlocking psychic webs formed by minute consciousnesses that you cannot perceive as such. The atoms and molecules within them have their own consciousness, as do the atoms and molecules with your body.
quotes.translation: 你物质环境中的场景，有时可爱的陈设，你所知的生活的物质面向，都是伪装，因此我称你的物质实相为伪装。然而这些伪装由宇宙的活力构成。岩石、石头、山脉与大地是活生生的伪装，是由你无法如此感知的微小意识所构成的连锁心理网络。它们内部的原子与分子拥有自己的意识，正如你身体内的原子与分子一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The brain deals exclusively with camouflage patterns, transforming vitality into physical environmental camouflage patterns. The mind deals with basic principles inherent on all planes. The brain is itself part of the camouflage pattern, and can be interpreted and probed by physical instruments. The mind cannot be probed by physical instruments. It cannot even be found by physical instruments. The mind is the connective. It is here that the secrets of the universe will be discovered, and the mind itself is the tool of discovery.
quotes.translation: 大脑专门处理伪装模式，将活力转化为物质环境的伪装模式。心智处理所有层面固有的基本原则。大脑本身是伪装模式的一部分，可以用物质仪器解读和探测。心智无法用物质仪器探测。它甚至无法被物质仪器找到。心智是连接器。宇宙的秘密将在这里被发现，而心智本身即是发现的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Here is an analogy. Imagine then the inner vitality being some cosmic sphere, but a sphere of more dimensions than you can imagine. Its motion could be called action, but this is deceptive because action is the basic nature of the sphere itself. Action is its composition. Action is that from which it is, therefore it moves, it acts outward. But all outwardness turns ultimately inward, and then again outward in all directions. And each inward action forms a new dimension that must, again, be thrust outward toward utilization.
quotes.translation: 这里有个比喻。试想内在活力是一个宇宙球体，但维度远超你的想象。它的运动可称为行动，但这具有欺骗性，因为行动是球体本身的基本性质。行动是其构成要素。行动是它存在的本源，因此它移动、向外作用。但所有外在最终都转向内在，随后再次向所有方向外扩。而每个内在行动都形成新的维度，这些维度又必须再次向外推展以待运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is no need to worry about your friend (Ruburt). We want you to realize that there is more than your human reality. We want you to realize that there is consciousness without form, that there is consciousness with will and vitality that comes to you from beyond even those places that your Seth knows. We want you to realize that though it is hard for us to communicate, we spoke with your race before your race learned language. We gave you mental images and upon these images you learned to form the world that you knew.
quotes.translation: 无需担忧你的朋友（鲁柏）。我们希望你明白，人类现实之外还有更多存在。我们希望你明白，存在无形无相的意识，存在具有意志与活力的意识，它们来自赛斯所知的领域之外。我们希望你明白，尽管沟通困难，但在你们种族习得语言之前，我们就曾与你们交流。我们给予你们心灵意象，你们凭借这些意象学会了构建所认知的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We come here also to one of the other causes of the dreaming state, beside those of which we have spoken in the past. The mind, of itself and separated from the ego, must still be action, and therefore never still. Since action of any kind, being composed of inner vitality, must seek materialization, the dreams become the constructions of that dream universe of which, again, we have spoken. But action can never complete itself. The dream once begun continues, and the dream universe itself forms anew other constructions.
quotes.translation: 除了过去谈及的成因，我们在此触及梦境状态的另一根源。脱离自我的心灵本身，作为行动的本质，永不停歇。由于任何行动都由内在活力构成，必然寻求物质化，梦境便成为我们曾提及的梦宇宙的建构。但行动永远无法完成自身。一旦开始的梦境持续延伸，梦宇宙本身又会形成新的建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What I am trying to say is that there are apparent rules of cause and effect, but the same causes do not always give the same effects. There is much more that I want to say along these lines. If you will perhaps consider again our wires and mazes, I have said if you'll excuse the brief reminder, that these imaginary wires are composed of solidified vitality. They are the living stuff of the universe even as they form its boundaries and seem to divide it into labyrinthine ways, like the inside of a honeycomb.
quotes.translation: 我想说明的是，因果法则看似存在，但相同的原因并不总产生相同的结果。关于这点我还有许多要说的。若你愿再次思考我们的导线与迷宫——请原谅这简短的提醒——这些虚构导线由固化活力构成。它们是宇宙的鲜活材质，既构成宇宙边界，又将宇宙分割成蜂巢般错综复杂的路径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Inner vitality attempts therefore to materialize itself completely, and yet because of its very nature, with each materialization it increases itself, making the attempt impossible. This is the basic dilemma, from which all types of reality spring. This of course leads us to the necessity for further discussion concerning the nature of inner vitality itself.
quotes.translation: 因此内在活力试图完全物质化自身，但因其本质特性，每次物质化都会增强自身，使这种尝试永不可能。这是所有现实形态衍生的基本困境。这自然要求我们进一步探讨内在活力本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You cannot use your daring in pirate ships any longer. (Humorous.) But use it you must or it could destroy the foundations of your vitality. Do not spend your energy in idle hobby pursuits. They do not fool you. But make sure that when you try to breathe vitality into your company, and form it, that you form it for the good. You have an opportunity--use it.
quotes.translation: 你们不能再把勇气用在海盗船上了（幽默语气）。但必须善用勇气，否则它会摧毁你活力的根基。不要把精力耗费在无益的嗜好上——它们骗不了你。当你试图将活力注入你的公司并塑造它时，务必确保这是为善而行。你拥有机遇——善用之。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The physical system suffers. It is impossible for the ego to block off specific connections with the whole personality, therefore any barriers effectively impede whole blocks of active and necessary vitality. In Ruburt's case now, the floodgates to the inner self are opened, so that the vitality rushes into those areas that have been to some extent denied.
quotes.translation: 身体系统会受苦。自我不可能阻断与整个人格之间的特定连接，因此任何障碍都会有效阻碍大量活跃且必要的生命力。以鲁柏目前的情况而言，通往内在自我的闸门已经开启，使得生命力涌入那些曾被部分否定的区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He simply adds some of his energy to that present in the animal, mixing this vitality with the animal's own. This does not mean that all animals are fragments in this manner, however. Animals, as any pet owner knows, have their own personalities and characteristics, and individual ways of perceiving the reality available to them. Some gobble experience. Their consciousness can be immeasurably quickened by contact with friendly humans, and emotional involvement with life is strongly developed.
quotes.translation: 他只是将自己的一部分能量加入动物已有的能量中，将这股生命力与动物自身的生命力相融合。但这并不意味着所有动物都是这样分裂的碎片。正如任何宠物主人所知，动物拥有自己的个性与特征，以及各自感知可及实相的方式。有些动物会狼吞虎咽地体验经验。通过与友善人类的接触，它们的意识能得到难以估量的加速，对生命的情感投入也会被强烈激发。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You cannot see a handful of air though your hands may be full of it. You know its effects, you breathe it constantly, but consciously you do not realize what you are doing. You do not know how air tastes unless you really think hard about it. It is fuel to your physical body and the idea of it comes very close to this fuel of the inner senses, which is not a camouflage effect and which is our vitality unsolidified, or the little wires which make up our imaginary universe. In other words these little wires move along constantly like little individual railway cars carrying fuel, and also are composed of the very fuel themselves.
quotes.translation: 你无法看见一把空气，尽管双手可能盈满空气。你知道它的作用，你不断呼吸它，但意识上你并未觉察自己在做什么。除非你真正认真思考，否则你不知道空气的味道。它是你肉体的燃料，而"空气"这个概念非常接近内在感官的燃料——这种燃料并非伪装效果，而是我们未固化的生命力，或是构成我们想象宇宙的细小线路。换言之，这些细小线路不断移动，如同载着燃料的微型独立列车，同时它们本身也由这种燃料构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The husband, now, should follow this exercise three times dail: He should imagine the energy and vitality of the universe filling his wife's form with vitality and health. Not a wishful thinking sort of thing, but a definite effort to understand that her form is indeed composed of this energy, and in this way he can help her use it to her advantage.
quotes.translation: 这位丈夫现在应每日三次进行此练习：他应想象宇宙的能量与生命力充满妻子的形体，赋予她活力与健康。这不是一厢情愿的幻想，而是明确理解她的形体确实由这种能量构成，通过这种方式他能帮助她善用这股能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Once more, the undifferentiated layers or areas are composed of the vitality that forms the camouflage of all systems. It is not therefore--that is, such an area is not, therefore--a separate thing in itself, but simply a portion of vitality that contains no camouflage, and is therefore again unrecognizable to those within any given system.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，未分化的层次或区域由构成所有系统伪装的生命力组成。因此，这样的区域本身并非独立存在之物，而只是不含伪装的生命力片段，因而对任何特定系统内的存在而言再次变得不可辨识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I have told you that a plane was not necessarily a location in space, but a field of mental vitality. The material that I have given you on the fifth dimension will here prove invaluable. I have told you that it is space, since this was the beginning of our discussions. During our earliest session I used the term space for simplicity's part for your sakes, while still explaining most carefully that this fifth-dimensional space was far different than what you consider space to be.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉你们，平面未必是空间中的位置，而是心灵生命力的场域。我提供给你们的关于第五维度的资料在此将证明无价。我曾告诉你们它是空间，因为这是我们讨论的起点。在最早的一次课中，为了你们的缘故，我使用了"空间"这个简化术语，同时仍最仔细地解释这种第五维度的空间与你们所认为的空间截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As breathing is carried on in a manner that seems automatic to the conscious mind, so this important function of transforming the vitality of the universe into pattern units also seems to be carried on automatically. But this transformation is not as apparent to the one part of yourself that you are pleased to recognize, and therefore it seems as if this transformation is carried on by someone even more distant and alien than the unrecognized part of yourself that breathes.
quotes.translation: 如同呼吸以看似自动的方式被意识心进行，这个将宇宙活力转化为模式单元的重要功能，似乎也是自动进行的。但这种转化对你乐于承认的那部分自己并不明显，因此它仿佛是由比那个你不承认的呼吸部分更遥远、更陌生的某个存在所完成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, other planes and systems are as real and as unreal as your own. They are all formed from inner vitality, which is the basic or ground reality. Many other systems reflect inner reality more clearly, with less distortions, but the distortions themselves are creations. All systems are then formed mentally, including your own.
quotes.translation: 现在，其他层面和系统与你们自己的层面一样真实，也一样不真实。它们都由内在活力形成，而内在活力是基本或根本实相。许多其他系统更清晰地反映了内在实相，扭曲较少，但扭曲本身也是创造。所有系统，包括你们自己的，都是在心智中形成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is precisely because the inner vitality is not accepted by the ego, that when it is acknowledged by the ego it seems so explosive. The ego attempts, this ego attempts, to stand aside and to deny the inevitability of change. The ego in this case, as in many cases, attempts to maintain stability and permanence at all costs.
quotes.translation: 正是因为内在活力不被自我所接受，所以当自我承认它时，它才显得如此具有爆炸性。自我试图——这个自我试图——置身事外，否认变化的必然性。在这种情况下，如同在许多情况下一样，自我试图不惜一切代价维持稳定和永久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Then let yourself experience. If you are used to terms like meditation, try to forget the term during this procedure. Do not use any name. Free yourself from concepts, and experience the being of yourself and the motion of your own vitality. Do not question, "Is this right? Am I doing it correctly? Am I feeling what I should feel?" This is the book's first exercise for you. You are not to use other people's criteria. There are no standards but your own feelings.
quotes.translation: 那么，让自己去体验。如果你习惯使用冥想之类的术语，请在此过程中忘记这个术语。不要使用任何名称。让自己从概念中解脱出来，体验你自身的存在和你自己活力的运动。不要问："这样对吗？我做对了吗？我感觉到了应该感觉到的吗？"这是本书为你准备的第一个练习。你不应该使用别人的标准。除了你自己的感受，没有其他标准。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In other words the apparent intensity of the egotistical reactions is a sham on the part of the ego, to hide the fact that it refuses to become involved with action as a whole, because it fears for its permanence. When the ego understands, and it will, that it is a portion of the whole self, and itself a part of action, then indeed it will not fear for its own permanence, for it will realize that being a part of action, its very nature is dependent upon change, and vitality, and value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，自我反应的表面强度是自我的一种伪装，用来掩盖它拒绝整体参与行动的事实，因为它担心自己的永久性。当自我理解到——它将会理解——它是整体自我的一部分，并且自身也是行动的一部分时，它就不会再担心自己的永久性，因为它会认识到，作为行动的一部分，它的本质依赖于变化、活力和价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your thinking mind, as you consider it, is the top of your mountain. In certain terms you can see "more" than your cells can, though they are also conscious of their realities. Were it not for their lives you would not be at the top of your psychological mountain. Even the trees at the highest tip of the hillside send sturdy roots into the ground, and receive from it nourishment and vitality -- and there is a great give-and-take between the smallest sapling in the foothills and the most ancient pine. No single blade of grass dies but that it affects the entire mountain. The energy within the grass sinks into the earth, and in your terms is again reborn. Trees, rocks, and grass constantly exchange places as energy changes form (very forcefully, leaning forward, eyes wide and dark).
quotes.translation: 你所以为的思维心智，是你这座山的顶峰。从某些方面来说，你比你的细胞"看到"的更多，尽管它们也意识到自己的实相。如果没有它们的生命，你就不会站在你心理之山的顶峰。即使是山坡最高处的树木，也会将强壮的根扎入大地，从中汲取滋养和活力——山麓最小的树苗与最古老的松树之间存在着巨大的给予与索取。没有一片草叶的死亡不会影响整座山。草叶内的能量沉入大地，按你们的说法，再次重生。当能量改变形态时，树木、岩石和草地不断交换位置（非常有力地，身体前倾，眼睛睁大而深邃）。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
