quotes.text: Give us a moment.... You have taught yourselves to be aware of and to follow only certain portions of your own consciousnesses, so that mentally you consider certain subjects taboo. Thoughts of death and suffering are among those. In a species geared above all to the survival of the fittest, and the competition among species, then any touch of suffering or pain, or thoughts of death, become dishonorable, biologically shameful, cowardly, nearly insane. Life is to be pursued at all costs--not because it is innately meaningful, but because it is the only game going, and it is a game of chance at best. One life is all you have, and that one is everywhere beset by the threat of illness, disaster, and war--and if you escape such drastic circumstances, then you are still left with a life that is the result of no more than lifeless elements briefly coming into a consciousness and vitality that is bound to end.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……你们已经教会自己只觉察并追随自身意识的特定部分，因此在心智上视某些主题为禁忌。死亡与苦难的念头便属此类。在一个以适者生存和物种竞争为最高准则的物种中，任何对痛苦、折磨或死亡的触及，都变得不光彩、在生物学上可耻、懦弱，近乎疯狂。生命要不惜一切代价去追求——并非因其内在有意义，而是因为这是唯一能玩的游戏，且充其量不过是场概率游戏。你只有一次生命，而这唯一的一次生命处处被疾病、灾难和战争的威胁所包围——即便你逃脱了这些极端境遇，所剩的生命也不过是无生命元素短暂聚合而成的意识与活力，注定终将消散。

quotes.text: The proximity of so many trees also has considerable health value, and to those doing psychic or other creative work the effects are particularly conducive to a peaceful state of mind. Trees are great users and yet conservators of energy, and they automatically provide much vitality to areas in which they are plentiful. This is physically obvious in scientific terms. Besides that, however, the consciousnesses of trees are remarkably kind and enduring.5
quotes.translation: 众多树木的邻近也具有相当的健康价值，对从事灵性或创造性工作的人而言，其效果尤其有助于营造平和的心境。树木是能量的巨大使用者兼保存者，它们会自动为树木繁茂的区域提供大量活力。这在科学术语的物理层面显而易见。此外，树木的意识异常仁慈且持久。

quotes.text: When and if it is killed by its brothers, this is not an act of cruelty but an innate understanding that the creature can no longer operate physically without agony; a quite natural euthanasia is involved, in which the "patient" also acquiesces. In your society such a natural death is most difficult, and because of the power structures can hardly be promoted. No one who decides upon death is saved from it by the medical profession, however. On deeper levels the quite normal desire for survival requires that the individual leave his or her body, in your terms, at one time or another. When that period arrives the person knows it, and the great vitality of the spirit no longer wants to be encased by a suffering physical body.
quotes.translation: 当它被同类杀死时，这并非残忍之举，而是出于一种与生俱来的理解：该生物已无法在不承受痛苦的情况下继续物理运作；这涉及一种相当自然的安乐死，而"患者"也默许了。在你们的社会中，这样的自然死亡极为困难，且因权力结构而几乎无法推广。然而，任何决定死亡的人都不会被医学界拯救。在更深层面上，相当正常的生存欲望要求个体在某个时刻离开其身体（用你们的话说）。当那个时期到来时，此人会知晓，而精神的巨大活力不再愿意被受苦的肉体所束缚。

quotes.text: As your daily endeavors have meaning and purpose, so do your dream adventures, and in these also you attain various goals of your own. These you will continue in the after-death experience. The vitality, force, life, and creativity behind your physical existence is generated in this other dimension. In other words, you are in many ways a fleshy projection of your dreaming self.
quotes.translation: 正如你们日常的努力具有意义和目的，你们的梦境冒险也是如此，在这些冒险中你们也达成各自的目标。这些目标将在死后经验中延续。你们物质存在背后的活力、力量、生命和创造力，正是在这个其他维度中生成的。换言之，你们在许多方面都是你们做梦自我的肉身投射。

quotes.text: The physical body is a camouflage pattern operating in a larger camouflage pattern. But the physical body and all camouflage patterns, looked at in another manner, are also transformers of the vital inner stuff of the universe, where this vitality is then enabled to operate under new and various conditions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体是一种在更大伪装模式中运作的伪装模式。但从另一种角度来看，物质身体及所有伪装模式，也是宇宙内在活力的转换器，这种活力借此得以在新的、多样的条件下运作。

quotes.text: The planes within the tiny wires, that is the planes formed by the connections and interconnections of our imaginary wires, come into the sphere of each different plane and take on the form inherent in the plane itself. Therefore these wires, if we may use a small analogy, will grow thick or thin, or change color completely, like some chameleon-like animal constantly camouflaging its true appearance by taking on the outward manifestations of each neighboring forest territory. Then too, the inhabitants of any particular plane are chameleon like, animal like. Solidified vitality wires do not look like boundaries or divisions. They appear exactly of the same type as the other materializations on that particular plane.
quotes.translation: 这些微小导线内的层面——即由我们假想导线的连接与互连所形成的层面——会进入每个不同层面的领域，并呈现出该层面本身固有的形态。因此，这些导线（若容我们作个小比喻）会变粗或变细，或完全改变颜色，如同某种变色龙般的动物，通过呈现相邻森林领地每个区域的外在表现，不断伪装其真实外观。同样地，任何特定层面的居民也像变色龙，像动物。固化的活力导线看起来并不像边界或分界线。它们看起来与该特定层面上的其他物质化形态完全属于同一类型。

quotes.text: Your father's greatest vitality was in the inventor's reality, and so in your terms this one suffered. This does not mean that each personality, regardless of probabilities, is not endowed with free will, and so forth. Each is born, in whatever system, from a source gestalt energy, and develops.
quotes.translation: 你父亲最大的活力存在于发明家的实相中，因此以你们的说法，这一世便遭受了磨难。这并不意味着每个不论概率如何的人格都不被赋予自由意志等等。每个个体无论处于何种系统，都诞生于一个源头的完形能量，并持续发展。

quotes.text: Because I say that you actually create the typical camouflage patterns of your own physical universe yourselves, by use of the inner vitality of the universe in the same manner that you form a pattern with your breath on a glass pane, I do not necessarily mean that you are the creators of the universe. I am merely saying that you are the creators of the physical world as you know it -- and herein, my beloved friends, lies a vast tale.
quotes.translation: 我说你们实际上是通过运用宇宙的内在活力，以在玻璃窗上哈气形成图案的同样方式，自行构建了你们物质宇宙的典型伪装模式，这并不必然意味着你们是宇宙的创造者。我只是说你们是你们所认知的物质世界的创造者——而在此处，我亲爱的朋友们，蕴藏着一个宏大的故事。

quotes.text: I have added here the addition of water to air, yet they are composed of the same elements. The elements are the blocks which build our camouflage. Air and water have many forms even on your plane. The elements change position constantly to transform the inner vitality or fuel from one camouflage pattern to another. Then why is it so difficult to understand that this happens on other planes and under different camouflage sequences?
quotes.translation: 我在此处将水加入空气，然而它们由相同的元素构成。这些元素是构建我们伪装的积木。即使在你们的层面上，空气和水也有多种形态。元素不断改变位置，将内在活力或燃料从一种伪装模式转化为另一种。那么，理解这在其他层面及不同伪装序列下同样发生，为何如此困难？

quotes.text: This is going to be a rather brief session comparatively. One note I wanted to make: As I have said, psychological time is a natural connective to the inner world. Though you experience days or hours within the framework of psychological time during the dream state, and yet do not age for a comparable amount of physical time, so as you develop in your use of psychological time you will be able to rest and be refreshed within the framework of psychological time while you are consciously awake. This will aid your mental and physical state to an amazing degree, and you will discover added vitality on the one hand, and a somewhat decreased need to sleep on the other.
quotes.translation: 相对而言这将是一次较简短的课。我想补充一点：如我所言，心理时间是通往内在世界的自然连接。尽管你们在梦境状态的心理时间框架内体验数日或数小时，却不会因等量的物理时间而衰老，因此随着你们在运用心理时间上的进展，当你们有意识地清醒时，也能在心理时间框架内获得休息与焕新。这将惊人地改善你们的身心状态，一方面你们会发现活力倍增，另一方面睡眠需求也会相应减少。

quotes.text: The smallest blade of grass, or flower, is aware of this connection, and without reasoning comprehends its position, its uniqueness and its source of vitality. The atoms and molecules that compose all objects, whether it be the body of a person, a table, a stone or a frog, know the great passive thrust of creativity that lies beneath their own existence, and upon which their individuality floats, distinct, clear and unassailable.
quotes.translation: 最微小的草叶或花朵都知晓这种连接，无需推理便能理解自身的位置、独特性及活力之源。构成所有物体的原子与分子——无论是人的身体、桌子、石头还是青蛙——都深知潜藏于自身存在之下的那股创造力的伟大被动推力，而它们的个体性便在这推力之上漂浮，清晰、独特且无可辩驳。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many sessions ago I used the analogy of air within your physical field, comparing it with the vitality of the universe, in that you are not as a rule conscious of air. Yet it is part of everything within your field. And also, that most inaccessible, most inward and seemingly most mysterious portion of the inner universe, which you seek, is so a part of you that you are unaware of it even though in it you have your very existence.
quotes.translation: 许多节课前，我曾用你们物理场域中的空气作比喻，将其比作宇宙的活力——正如你们通常意识不到空气的存在，它却是你们场域内万物的组成部分。同样，你们所追寻的那个最难以触及、最内在、看似最神秘的内在宇宙部分，正是你们的一部分，以至于你们对它毫无察觉，尽管你们的存在本身便依托于它。

quotes.text: Your spirit joined itself with flesh, and in flesh, to experience a world of incredible richness, to help create a dimension of reality of colors and of form. Your spirit was born in flesh to enrich a marvelous area of sense awareness, to feel energy made into corporeal form. You are here to use, enjoy, and express yourself through the body. You are here to aid in the great expansion of consciousness. You are not here to cry about the miseries of the human condition, but to change them when you find them not to your liking through the joy, strength and vitality that is within you; to create the spirit as faithfully and beautifully as you can in flesh.
quotes.translation: 你的灵与肉身结合，在肉身中体验一个无比丰富的世界，协助创造色彩与形态的实相维度。你的灵生于肉身，是为了丰富那奇妙的感官觉知领域，感受能量化为物质形态。你在此是为了通过身体去运用、享受并表达自己。你在此是为了协助意识进行伟大的扩展。你并非在此哀叹人类处境的悲惨，而是要在发现不如意时，通过内在的喜悦、力量与活力去改变它们；尽可能忠实而美丽地在肉身中创造灵性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At times the ego can hold you in a tight vice, which the dissociation breaks. This is what happened after your exercises. You have been doing very well, for you, in allowing yourself psychic freedom. However conscious fears cause the ego to tighten its grasp and some effects of this nature were starting up again. This is why I suggested that you begin these exercises now. The fact that the fearful ego was beginning to tighten explains your reaction to the exercises. The ego can build up around the subconscious vitality like a glacier, and these exercises melt it away. Even the prickles in your neck are like tiny picks chipping away at icy fears.
quotes.translation: 有时自我会像紧钳般束缚你，而解离能打破这种束缚。这就是你练习后发生的情况。就你而言，你在允许自己获得心灵自由方面做得很好。然而有意识的恐惧会让自我收紧掌控，这类性质的某些影响又开始重现。这就是我建议你现在开始这些练习的原因。恐惧的自我开始收紧，这解释了你对练习的反应。自我能像冰川般堆积在潜意识活力周围，而这些练习能融化它。就连你颈部的刺痛感，也像细小的凿子般敲碎冰封的恐惧。

quotes.text: In the terms that you can understand (underlined), all species that you are aware of (underlined) appeared more or less at once, because the mental patterns had peaked (gesturing). Their vitality was strong enough to form differentiation and cooperation within the framework of matter.
quotes.translation: 用你能理解的术语来说，你所知的所有物种几乎同时出现，因为心智模式已达到巅峰。它们的活力足以在物质框架内形成分化与合作。

quotes.text: Your intimate life will also reflect Ruburt's complete recovery. Do not give up your efforts too soon. He is well on the road to complete recovery. There is an acceleration process here that will work to your advantage as larger and larger blocks of symptoms disappear. For with each day, he has greater vitality, you see, that he did not have earlier, that works for him and for complete recovery with ever-growing strength.
quotes.translation: 你的亲密生活也将反映鲁柏的完全康复。不要过早放弃努力。他正走在完全康复的道路上。这里存在一个加速过程，随着越来越大的症状群消失，这将对你有利。因为每一天，他都拥有更早之前所没有的更大活力，这活力为他效力，并以日益增长的力量推动完全康复。

quotes.text: You set yourself against all of this, against the gist of life and joy and vitality, and turn your back upon it with the paltry excuse: "If one person does not love me in a male-female relationship in this life, then I threaten to destroy myself, and shatter the form that holds the spirit, and shatter the form like a glass thrown upon the floor, like a child in a tantrum." (Voice louder; very emphatic and fast delivery.)
quotes.translation: 你与这一切——与生命、喜悦和活力的精髓——作对，并用微不足道的借口背弃它："如果今生没有人在男女关系中爱我，那我就威胁要毁灭自己，粉碎承载灵性的形态，像摔碎地板上的玻璃杯般粉碎形态，像个发脾气的孩子。"（声音更大；语气非常强调且语速快。）

quotes.text: It is very possible for one dreamer who is a Speaker, to go to the aid of another individual who is having some difficulties in an inner reality within the dream state. The idea of guardian angels of course is highly connected here. A good Speaker is as effective within one reality as he is within the other, creating psychic frameworks within physical reality as well as within interior environments. Many artists, poets, and musicians are Speakers, translating one world in terms of another, forming psychic structures that exist in both with great vitality -- structures that may be perceived from more than one reality at once.
quotes.translation: 作为讲述者的做梦者，极有可能去帮助另一个在梦境状态的内在实相中遇到困难的人。守护天使的概念与此高度相关。一位优秀的讲述者在一个实相中与在另一个实相中同样有效，既在物质实相中创造心灵框架，也在内在环境中创造。许多艺术家、诗人与音乐家都是讲述者，他们用一种世界的语言翻译另一种世界，形成在两者中都充满活力的心灵结构——这些结构可同时从多个实相中被感知。

quotes.text: On many other planes the vitality expresses itself in ways incomprehensible to you and at this point to me. The personality-entity concept involves only one main type process involving many planes and plane groups. But this is not All That Is or exists. It is extremely possible that many in the personality-existence grouping have been involved within other completely different plane groupings in some inconceivable past.
quotes.translation: 在许多其他层面上，生命力以你们——以及此刻的我——无法理解的方式表达自己。人格-本体概念只涉及一种主要过程，涵盖许多层面和层面群组。但这并非一切万有或存在的一切。极有可能的是，在人格-存在群组中的许多个体，在某个难以想象的过去，曾参与过其他完全不同的层面群组。

quotes.text: Now I do not mean this to be merely a symbolic exercise, for though it may begin with imagination, it is based upon fact, and emanations from your consciousness and the creativity of your soul do indeed reach outward in that manner. The exercise will give you some idea of the true nature, creativity, and vitality of the soul from which you can draw your own energy and of which you are an individual and unique portion.

quotes.text: Now you will understand why I said earlier that sound can be seen and color can be heard. There are many diverse examples along this line. If I said this in the beginning before this discussion, it would have choked you to swallow it.
quotes.translation: 现在你们会明白为何我先前说声音可以被看见，颜色可以被听见。沿着这条线索有许多不同的例子。约瑟，请恕我冒昧——我确实冒着变得乏味的风险——我想简要重复：精神酵素使固化的生命力能够改变其形态。如果我在这次讨论之前就提出这一点，你们会难以接受。

quotes.text: This time the psychic safety valve has had too much. The nicest thing that could happen would be that you suddenly blew your stack and kicked him. The worst thing that could happen would be that once again you restrain the acknowledgement of the pent up, perfectly natural aggression that is now ready to explode -- so you send out a thought-form out of all proportion to any of the events that have transpired. The thought-form causes your friend severe harm; and all of this because you were afraid that one stray aggressive thought of yours was more powerful than the vitality that resides in each of you.
quotes.translation: 这次心灵的安全阀承受了太多。最好的情况是你们突然爆发，痛揍他一顿。最坏的情况是你们再次压抑那蓄积已久、即将爆发的完全自然的攻击性——于是你们送出一个与已发生事件完全不成比例的思想形。这个思想形对你们的朋友造成严重伤害；而这一切，都是因为你们害怕自己一个失控的攻击性念头，竟比你们每个人内在的生命力更强大。

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据特定法则演化。它们仅反映其背后的理念，而你必须认识到这些理念源自不同源头。它们确实源于潜意识，但在此之前，内在感官会接收到一种理念特质。有时这种理念特质以直觉形式被接收，并由此激发进入显意识。然而，显意识自我是伪装模式的主要操纵者与显性推动者。构成伪装模式的实际材料，正是存在且被你的人格无意识运用的生命力。

It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.3
quotes.translation: 然而梦境世界、心智与内在基本宇宙确实存在……存在于我们称之为心理实相的价值气候中。这是媒介，取代了你所谓的空间。它是一种使所有存在与意识成为可能的特质。它是生命力背后或之内最强大的原理之一，而生命力本身又从自身构成所有其他现象。

To lump them together in such a way, however, is misleading, for within all of this there is great order.
quotes.translation: 其中部分会落入超光速组别，并在该框架内具有可感知的生命力。这些超光速粒子自然以自身形态存在。此类单元存在众多范围与巨大多样性，皆超越你可感知的范畴。但如此笼统归类会产生误导，因为这一切之中存在着伟大秩序。

quotes.text: Those involved in such disasters -- the survivors -- often use such "larger-than-life" circumstances in order to participate in affairs that seem to have greater import than those possessed by previous humdrum existences. They seek the excitement, whatever its consequences. They become a part of history to whatever extent. For once their private lives are identified with a greater source -- and from it many derive new strength and vitality. Social barriers are dropped, economic positions forgotten. The range of private emotions is given greater, fuller, sweep.
quotes.translation: 卷入此类灾难的幸存者，常利用这些"超越日常"的情境参与看似比先前平淡存在更具重大意义的事件。他们寻求刺激，无论其后果如何。他们以某种程度成为历史的一部分。因为他们的私人生活一度与更伟大的源头认同——许多人由此获得新力量与生命力。社会藩篱被打破，经济地位被遗忘。私人情感的范畴获得更广阔、更充分的驰骋空间。

quotes.translation: 器官、原子与分子、细胞及其他成分的这份意识，无论它们原本拥有何种程度的意识与活力，都不会减弱——当然不足以维持任何程度的形态或组织。然而，这个形象也部分由那些观看它的人所维持。关于这一点，你会在我们讨论物质本质时找到解释。

quotes.text: I tell you now--and for the sake of our guests--that death is not sober and it is not death. You simply take a giant step forward. And as my friends know that I will, I will tell you that all vitality rings... and it rings through this frame and it rings through your own frame... and it is lighthearted... and it is joyful... and it knows not sobriety... As you know, it is a lighthearted thing.
quotes.translation: 我现在告诉你们——也为了我们的客人——死亡并不严肃，而且它并非死亡。你只是向前迈出一大步。正如我的朋友们知道我会说的那样，我会告诉你们：所有生命力都在鸣响……它穿透这个架构，也穿透你们自己的架构……它是轻快的……它是喜悦的……它不知严肃为何物……如你们所知，这是一件轻快的事。

quotes.text: In itself an object should be then felt as its unique identity, and as a part of the whole universe. A stone or a flower is a very small thing. When you attach your attention say to a flower, it is not only a matter of imagining yourself as the flower, or trying to sensewhat a flower is. It is also to imagine the power of the energy that causes that flower to grow; and yet in a landscape you will have perhaps many flowers. They must each suggest the reality of the overall pulsating vitality that makes their appearance possible.
quotes.translation: 物体本身应被感受为其独特的身份，以及整个宇宙的一部分。一块石头或一朵花是非常微小的事物。当你将注意力集中在一朵花上时，这不仅是想象自己成为那朵花，或试图感受一朵花是什么。这也是去想象那股促使那朵花生长的能量之力；然而在风景中，你或许会有许多花朵。它们每一朵都必须暗示那使它们得以显现的整体脉动活力的实相。

By the time that the end of the cycle is reached, minor disabilities are all that are usually encountered, because the vitality has been largely freed, and usually the most devastating problems have been solved.

quotes.text: Now I wish to make another point along these lines. No one, I am sure, denies the existence of air because ordinarily you do not see it. No one denies the existence of air because they do not understand the method by which their own lungs breathe. Yet they know that they breathe, and they know that without breath death is inevitable. To deny the existence of air would seem ridiculous. It is just as ridiculous to deny this vitality because it is usually unseen, or because you do not understand how you use it.
quotes.translation: 现在我想就此再提出一点。我相信没有人会否认空气的存在，因为通常你看不见它。没有人会否认空气的存在，因为他们不了解自己肺部呼吸的方式。然而他们知道自己呼吸，也知道没有呼吸死亡是不可避免的。否认空气的存在似乎很荒谬。否认这种活力也同样荒谬，因为它通常不可见，或因为你不了解自己如何使用它。

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, the conscious mind is a window through which you look outward -- and looking outward, perceive the fruits of your inner mind. Often you let false beliefs blur that great vision. Your joy, vitality and accomplishment do not come from the outside to you as the result of events that "happen to you." They spring from inner events that are the result of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 可以说，意识心是一扇窗户，你透过它向外看——而向外看时，你感知到了内在心灵的果实。虚假信念常常模糊了那伟大的视野。你的喜悦、活力与成就并非来自外界，也不是“发生在你身上”的事件的结果。它们源于内在事件，而这些事件正是你信念的产物。

quotes.text: Different outer senses are necessary at different levels and on various planes to interpret the different camouflage patterns. These outer senses are developed to cope with these particular camouflage patterns which the personality will meet in its various environments. The inner senses always operate regardless of the particular environment in which the personality is presently involved. The inner senses provide the whole personality with balance, and enable it to keep in contact with its vitality source.
quotes.translation: 不同的外在感官在不同层次和层面上是必要的，用以解读不同的伪装模式。这些外在感官被发展出来，以应对人格在其各种环境中将遇到的特定伪装模式。内在感官则始终运作，无论人格当前所处的特定环境如何。内在感官为整个人格提供平衡，并使其能够与自身的活力源头保持联系。

quotes.text: Illness and suffering are not thrust upon you by God, or by All That Is, or by an outside agency. quotes.translation: 疾病与痛苦并非由神、或一切万有、或任何外在力量强加于你。它们是学习过程的副产品，由你创造，本身相当中性……疾病与痛苦是创造性能量误用的结果。然而，它们仍是创造力的一部分。它们并非来自与健康及活力不同的源头。痛苦对灵魂并无益处，除非它教会你如何停止痛苦。那才是它的目的……

quotes.text: The fact is that your plane originated because enough entities needed certain types of experience to warrant such a creation, and they set about forming it through the process of evolution. That I believe you understand. The smallest minute first portion represented the will and vitality of all the entities that would ever dwell upon the earth that would come after.
quotes.translation: 事实是，你们的层面之所以存在，是因为有足够多的存有需要特定类型的经验来促成这样的创造，于是他们通过进化过程着手构建它。我相信这一点你们是理解的。那最初最微小的第一份，代表着所有将居住在地球上、随后到来的存有的意志与活力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This seems strange because you do not fully comprehend that the energy, the vitality that is individualized into consciousness forms the physical body; and once it appears on your plane it can leave the body and reassemble itself. It would represent no more in one way to the atoms and molecules through which it passed, than the wind that passes through the treetops.
quotes.translation: 这似乎很奇怪，因为你们并未完全理解：被个体化为意识的能量与活力，构成了物质身体；而一旦它出现在你们的层面上，它就能离开身体并重新组合自身。从某种角度来看，它对其所经过的原子与分子而言，不过如同穿过树梢的风一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: True self -knowledge is indispensable for health or vitality, and this means in every instance. The recognition of the truth about the self means that you must first discover what you think about yourself subconsciously. If this is a good image, build upon it. If it is a poor one, recognize it as simply the opinion of the subconscious and not as a definite truth.
quotes.translation: 真正的自我认知对于健康或活力而言是不可或缺的，这在任何情况下都适用。认清关于自我的真相意味着，你必须首先发现自己潜意识里是如何看待自己的。如果这是一个良好的形象，就以此为基础加以建设；如果这是一个糟糕的形象，就将其视为潜意识的一种看法，而非确定的真理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: New paragraph. When you grow from a baby to an adult you do not just grow tall: You grow all about yourself, adding weight and thickness as well. To some extent events "grow" in the same fashion, and from the inside out, as you do. In a dream you are closer to those stages in which events are born. In your terms they emerge from the future and form the past, and are given vitality because of creative tension that exists between what you think of as your birth and your death.
quotes.translation: 新段落。当你从婴儿成长为成人时，你不仅仅是在长高：你是在全面成长，同时增加体重与厚度。在某种程度上，事件也以同样的方式"成长"，并且像你一样，从内向外发展。在梦境中，你更接近那些事件诞生的阶段。用你们的话来说，它们从未来涌现并形成过去，并且因你们所谓的出生与死亡之间存在的创造性张力而获得活力。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is on your part more than anything else, a simple refusal to admit into existence anything that is not a camouflage pattern. Camouflage patterns are of course, with again some exceptions, essentials on any plane, since each type represents the actual form of the plane and the various characteristics within it. Nevertheless it is possible, and actually much more efficient and simple, to accept this fact and also realize and admit the inner vitality behind the camouflage.
quotes.translation: 对你们而言，这最主要是一种简单的拒绝：拒绝承认任何非伪装模式的存在。当然，除了一些例外，伪装模式在任何层面上都是必不可少的，因为每种类型都代表着该层面的实际形式及其内部的各种特征。尽管如此，接受这一事实，同时认识并承认伪装背后的内在活力，是可能的，而且实际上更为高效和简单。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The study of time will teach you much about fifth dimension also. Our imaginary wires composed of solidified vitality are fluid, I hope you understand this, even while they are solidified. For solidity is only illusion.
quotes.translation: 对时间的研究也将教会你们许多关于第五维度的知识。我们那些由固化活力构成的想象性导线是流动的——我希望你们能理解这一点——即使它们处于固化状态时也是如此。因为固化只是一种幻象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You must remember that the outer senses react to camouflage pattern. The statue actually imprisons vitality more than a painting or musical composition or poem, because it is bound to you by so many ties. I meant to make this plain earlier. I won't keep you any longer, lest you grow impatient with me tomorrow. At all costs I don't want to wear out my welcome.
quotes.translation: 你必须记住，外在感官反应的是伪装模式。雕像实际上比绘画、乐曲或诗歌更禁锢活力，因为它通过如此多的纽带与你相连。我本想早些说明这点。我不再久留，免得你明天对我失去耐心。无论如何，我不想让自己不受欢迎。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am afraid I have taken you too deeply into these matters too early. There are no simple answers. There is complexity and growth and the dynamics of vitality always; and these find new forms, new diversions and new creations constantly. Your own animals and all the various species that you know belong to a general grouping, with man presently holding forth.
quotes.translation: 恐怕我过早地让你深入这些课题了。没有简单的答案。始终存在着复杂性、成长和活力的动态；这些不断寻找新的形式、新的转向和新的创造。你认识的动物和所有各种物种都属于一个总体分类，而人类目前占据主导地位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He never served, truly, as a male image for you or your brothers. Both of your parents, unfortunately in this life, served as uncomplimentary female images. This is why you trust the male qualities in Ruburt; why Richard chose a family in which he married where the males have been dominant, and why Loren chose for a wife a woman with more vitality than he.
quotes.translation: 他从未真正为你或你的兄弟充当过男性形象。不幸的是，在这一生中，你的双亲都充当了不讨喜的女性形象。这就是为什么你信任鲁柏身上的男性特质；为什么理查选择了一个男性主导的家庭结婚；为什么洛伦选择了一个比他更有活力的女人为妻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Action （you may if you prefer use the term vitality; I prefer the term action） action continually attempts to express itself in endless formations. It therefore materializes itself in various forms. I term these forms camouflage. Within your system the camouflage is physical matter. It is impossible for action to completely express itself in any medium.
quotes.translation: 行动（如果你愿意，可以用活力这个词；我更喜欢行动这个词）行动不断试图在无尽的形态中表达自己。因此它在各种形式中将自己物质化。我把这些形式称为伪装。在你们的系统内，伪装就是物质实体。行动不可能在任何媒介中完全表达自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... The complete physician would be a person who learned to understand the dynamics of being, the soul-body relationship -- one who was healthy in his or her own body. Unhappy people cannot teach you to be happy. Sick ones cannot teach you to be well. Psychiatrists have a high suicide rate. Why do you think they can help you live happily, or add to your vitality? Physicians are not the healthiest of men by far.4 Why do you think they can cure you?
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……完全的医生会是学会理解存在的动态、灵魂与身体关系的人——一个在自己身体中健康的人。不快乐的人无法教你快乐。生病的人无法教你健康。精神科医生的自杀率很高。你认为他们凭什么能帮你快乐地生活，或增加你的活力？医生远非最健康的人。你认为他们凭什么能治愈你？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 703
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There is indeed no hard and fast rule to tell you which actions are basically impeding actions, and which are not. For what may appear an impeding action may indeed turn out to be the burst of a new and constructive direction, which may eventually represent a new and stronger pattern of identity and integrity, that will completely refresh the original unit and add to its vitality and strength.
quotes.translation: 确实没有硬性规则告诉你哪些行动基本上是阻碍性的，哪些不是。因为看似阻碍性的行动，可能最终成为新建设性方向的爆发，最终可能代表一个更新、更强的身份与完整性模式，完全刷新原始单元，并增加其活力与力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Now nevertheless the dream world, the mind and the reality universe do exist. They exist in a climate that we will call the value climate of psychological reality. This is the medium. This takes the place of what you call space. This value climate of psychological reality is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境世界、心智与实相宇宙确实存在。它们存在于我们称之为心理实相价值气候的氛围中。这个媒介取代了你们所谓的空间。这种心理实相的价值气候是一种品质，它使一切存在与意识成为可能。它是生命力背后或内部最强大的原理之一，而生命力本身从自身衍生出所有其他现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Reading this material and understanding the nature of this attack should end it. His book is helping others in Saratoga. He should be drawing gratitude and health from this thought reality. The yoga exercises will in themselves straighten out the kinks here, with his understanding, as he begins to automatically attract forces of health and vitality.
quotes.translation: 阅读这份资料并理解这次攻击的本质，应能终结它。他的书正在萨拉托加帮助他人。他应当从这思想实相中汲取感恩与健康。瑜伽练习本身，加上他的理解，将理顺这些纠结，因为他开始自动吸引健康与生命力的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: [Each] cell, then, as I have often said, operates so well in time because it is, in those terms, precognitive. It is aware of the position, health, vitality, of all other cells on the face of the planet. It is aware of the position of each grain of sand on the shores of each ocean, and in those terms it forms a portion of the earth's consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，正如我常说的，每个细胞在时间中运作得如此完美，是因为在那些术语中，它是预知的。它知晓地球上所有其他细胞的位置、健康与生命力。它知晓每片海洋岸边每粒沙的位置，并且在那些术语中，它构成了地球意识的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I wish you then a hearty good evening, and to your friend, our present beloved young wom an, Ruburt's Pat Norelli, my best wishes for a beginning now, of vitality and joy, as you throw aside all conditions, and accept your life for what it is and will (underlined) be--a joy, an exaltation to yourself, and a help to all those you will still contact.
quotes.translation: 那么，我祝你们晚上愉快，并向你们的朋友，我们亲爱的年轻女子，鲁柏的帕特·诺雷利，致以最美好的祝愿：愿你们从现在开始，抛开所有条件，接受你们生命的本然与将然——一种喜悦，一种对自身的升华，以及对你们仍将接触之人的帮助，从而开启活力与喜悦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This has something to do with Ruburt's difficulty in breaking the trance state. (Pause.) From someone else here... Your figures, to get the feeling of depth and breadth, this is not to get the feeling simply of the flesh and bone within the flesh, but to suggest the personal energy and vitality that is in a riot, to be loose within the flesh.
quotes.translation: 这与鲁柏难以脱离出神状态有关。（停顿。）从这里的另一个人……你们的人物形象，为了获得深度与广度的感觉，这不仅仅是为了感受肉体中的骨骼与肌肉，而是为了暗示那在肉体中奔放、松散的个人能量与生命力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The self that you know is but one fragment of your entire identity. These fragment selves are not strung together, however, like beads of a string. They are more like the various skins of an onion, or segments of an orange, all connected through the one vitality and growing out into various realities while springing from the same source.
quotes.translation: 你所知的自我只是你整个身份的一个片段。然而，这些片段自我并非像珠子一样串在一起。它们更像洋葱的层层外皮，或橙子的瓣瓣果肉，都通过同一个生命力相连，并源自同一源头，生长进入不同的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not comparing personality to an orange or an onion, but I want to emphasize that as these things grow from within outward, so does each fragment of the entire self. You observe the outside aspect of objects. Your physical senses permit you to perceive the exterior forms to which you then react, but your physical senses to some extent force you to perceive reality in this manner, and the inside vitality within matter and form is not so apparent.
quotes.translation: 我并非将人格比作橘子或洋葱，但我想强调，正如这些事物由内向外生长，整个自体的每个片段也是如此。你观察到物体的外在面向。你的肉体感官让你感知到外在形式，你随后对其做出反应，但你的肉体感官在某种程度上迫使你以这种方式感知实相，而物质与形式内在的生命力并不那么明显。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In other sessions I have explained precisely and in detailed fashion the steps by which this individualized vitality forms its own energy into molecules and atoms, which are the basis for further more advanced gestalts. For his refusal to pursue the examination of such forces, mankind suffers greatly the results of his own ignorance.
quotes.translation: 在其他课中，我曾精确而详细地解释过，这个个体化的生命力如何将其自身能量形成分子与原子，这些是更高级完形的基础。由于人类拒绝探究这类力量，他们因自身的无知而深受其苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action can never be considered apart from that which is seemingly acted upon, for action becomes a part of structure. Action begins from within, and is a result of inner vitality inherent within all realities. Some action is always present. Action itself is not a thing alone. It is not an identity. Action is a dimension of existence.
quotes.translation: 行动绝不能与被作用的对象分开考虑，因为行动成为结构的一部分。行动始于内在，是所有实相内在固有生命力的结果。某种行动始终存在。行动本身并非单独之物。它不是一个身份。行动是存在的一个维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They can exist with these, but they cannot exist if you insist that such a relationship is the condition upon which you will accept existence. You are saying "Unless existence meets my terms, I will not exist," and no one has the right to so set themselves against their own innate vitality and the joy of life that is within them.
quotes.translation: 它们可以带着这些而存在，但如果你坚持这种关系是你接受存在的条件，它们就无法存在。你是在说：“除非存在符合我的条件，否则我就不存在。”没有人有权如此对抗自己内在的生命力与内在的生命喜悦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Natural therapy, therefore, is difficult to achieve to its fullest benefit in your society, because it is constantly interfered with from the time of your birth. Yet it operates regardless of interference, and is always at your command to give health and vitality to the living sculpture in which you have your present experience.
quotes.translation: 因此，自然疗法在你的社会中很难达到最大效益，因为它从你出生之时起就不断受到干扰。然而，它不顾干扰仍在运作，并且始终听命于你，为你当前经验所在的活雕塑赋予健康与生命力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (See the notes're the article, on page 231.) It insures its own success, and contains its own vitality. Now, I have endowed it with this. (Pause.) The other books you see already exist, and wait only to be given physical form. (Pause.) your own masterpieces exist, and only wait for you to find them and give them physical form.
quotes.translation: （见第231页文章的注释。）它确保自身的成功，并包含自身的生命力。现在，我已赋予它这一点。（停顿。）你看到的其他书籍已经存在，只等待被赋予物质形式。（停顿。）你自己的杰作已经存在，只等待你去发现它们并赋予物质形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These are quite practical statements. Your body has an overall body consciousness filled with energy and vitality. It automatically rights any imbalances, but your conscious beliefs also affect this body consciousness. Your muscles believe what you tell them about themselves. So does every other portion of your physical body.
quotes.translation: 这些是非常实际的陈述。你的身体拥有一个充满能量与活力的整体身体意识。它会自动修正任何失衡，但你意识层面的信念也会影响这个身体意识。你的肌肉相信你告诉它们的一切，你肉体的其他部分也是如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The vitality of the species in fact was assured because it did not overspecialize in terms of sexuality. There was no fixed mating period, for example. Instead, the species could reproduce freely so that in the event of a catastrophe of any kind, it would not be so tied into rigid patterns that it might result in extinction.
quotes.translation: 事实上，物种的活力之所以得到保障，正是因为它在性方面没有过度专门化。例如，没有固定的交配期。相反，物种可以自由繁衍，这样在任何灾难发生时，它就不会被僵化的模式束缚，从而导致灭绝。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This energy comes from the core of BEING (in capital letters), from All That Is (with our usual capitals), and represents the source of never-ending vitality. It is Being, Being in You. As such, all of the energy and power of Being is focused and reflected through you in the direction of your three-dimensional existence.
quotes.translation: 这股能量来自"存有"（大写）的核心，来自"一切万有"（按惯例大写），代表着永不枯竭的活力之源。它就是"存有"，是你内在的"存有"。正因如此，"存有"所有的能量与力量都通过你聚焦并反射到你三维存在的方向上。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Back here, we have a question from the gallery. (Smiling.) You must realize that you do not form events alone. You are involved in a cooperative venture. Usually then you alone are not responsible for an event, because others participate in its creation -- for their own reasons. The question cannot be answered simply in one evening, but each consciousness has its own defense system and its own vitality; you should trust your own.
quotes.translation: 回到这里，观众席有个问题。（微笑。）你必须明白，你不是单独形成事件的。你参与的是一个合作性的冒险。通常来说，你一个人并不对某个事件负责，因为其他人——出于他们自己的理由——也参与了它的创造。这个问题无法在一个晚上简单回答，但每个意识都有它自己的防御系统和它自己的活力；你应该信任你自己的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such affirmation will lead you to your own inner discoveries, and attract from the deepest portions of your being the particular kind of information, experience, or perception that you need. The loving acceptance of yourself will allow you to ride through beliefs as you would through the changing characteristics of a countryside. The more a belief encourages you to use your abilities and vitality, then the more affirmative it is.
quotes.translation: 这样的肯定将引领你走向内在的发现，并从你存有的最深处吸引你所需要的特定信息、体验或感知。对自我的慈爱接纳将让你穿越信念，就像你穿越一片不断变化的乡野风景。一个信念越是鼓励你运用你的能力与活力，它就越是具有肯定性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I spoke of this second dilemma. The first dilemma is that which exists when inner vitality struggles to completely materialize, though it cannot completely materialize. The reasons for its inability to completely materialize have been given in a previous session, and I will discuss the matter again at a later date.
quotes.translation: 我谈过这第二个困境。第一个困境是：当内在活力挣扎着要完全物质化时，它却无法完全物质化。它无法完全物质化的原因已在之前的一节课中给出，我将在日后再次讨论这个问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Under usual conditions it will not be perceived by those still in physical form. This form is much like the form in which you project, but the form which you project is not truly complete, for there must be some (underlined) division of vitality so that physical existence is maintained during out-of-body episodes.
quotes.translation: 在通常情况下，仍处于肉身形态的人无法感知它。这种形态与你投射出的形态极为相似，但你投射出的形态并非真正完整，因为必须存在某种（划线强调的）生命力的分割，以便在出体期间维持物质实相的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner senses provide their own "transportation," and put that in quotes. Transportation as such is valid only within a space framework and within a time concept, such as those on your own plane. The "transportation" （in quotes） of the inner senses consists mainly of what you might call a changing of frequencies or vibrations or pulsations, a transformation of vitality-form from one particular pattern or aspect to another.
quotes.translation: 内在感官提供它们自己的"交通工具"，请将这个词加上引号。交通工具本身只在你所在层面的空间框架和时间概念内才有效。内在感官的"交通工具"（加引号）主要包含你所谓的频率、振动或脉动的改变，即生命力形态从一种特定模式或面向向另一种的转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In one way you are the steps leading up to yourself, or the spirals leading in to yourself. The painting spirals outward from your inner reality, and it brings forth energy and previous connections and interpretations. You form these anew, however, adding to them the knowledge and vitality of your present self.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度看，你既是通往自我的阶梯，也是通向自我的螺旋。这幅画从你的内在实相向外螺旋延伸，它带出能量、先前的关联与诠释。然而，你以当下的自我所拥有的知识与生命力，将这些重新整合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You cannot find your psyche by thinking of it as a separate thing, like a fine jewel in an eternal closet. You can only experience its strength and vitality by exploring the subjective reality that is your own, for it will lead you unerringly to that greater source of being that transcends both space and time.
quotes.translation: 你无法通过将心灵视为独立之物（如同永恒壁橱中的精美宝石）来找到它。你只能通过探索属于你自己的主观实相来体验它的力量与生命力，因为它将准确无误地引领你抵达那超越时空的更大存在本源。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It will be highly advantageous now for him to renew projection attempts. His enthusiasm is returning as far as his work is concerned. This is automatically beneficial. Nightly suggestions should deal now with general health and vitality, and with pictures of anticipation for the following day's activities.
quotes.translation: 现在他重新尝试出体将极为有利。就工作而言，他的热情正在恢复。这自动带来益处。每晚的暗示应聚焦于整体健康与生命力，并包含对次日活动的期待画面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You may occasionally employ the association of ideas, one thought leading easily to another. When you do this you often perceive new insights. As the events fall apart from time continuity in your mind they seem to take on fresh vitality. You have unstructured them, you see, from the usual organization.
quotes.translation: 你偶尔可以运用联想机制，让一个念头自然引向另一个。当你这样做时，常会感知到新的洞见。当事件从你心智中的时间连续性中脱离时，它们似乎焕发出崭新的生命力。你看，你已将它们从惯常的组织结构中解构出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The protoplasm is not entirely physical, however, but in a basic manner is a meeting ground between physical matter and inner vitality. Therefore the characteristic ways used by any given personality, in connection with his or her physical image, will also be used in the construction of dream images.
quotes.translation: 原生质并非完全属于物质层面，而是以基本方式成为物质与内在活力的交汇场域。因此，任何特定人格在其物质形象中所运用的特质方式，也将被用于构建梦境影像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Illness and suffering are the results of the misdirection of creative energy. They are a part of the creative force, however. They do not come from a different source than, say, health and vitality. Suffering is not good for the soul, unless it teaches you how to stop suffering. That is its purpose.
quotes.translation: 疾病与痛苦是创造性能量误用的结果，但它们仍是创造力的组成部分。它们与健康、活力源自同一源头。痛苦对灵魂无益，除非它能教会你如何停止痛苦——这正是其目的所在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses are actually the channels through which the entire composition of any particular plane is appreciated and actually maintained. It is through the inner senses that the mental enzymes are enabled to act upon the vitality which is, as I have said, the structure of the universe itself.
quotes.translation: 内在感官实则是感知并维系任一特定层面整体构成的通道。正是通过内在感官，精神酵素得以作用于那构成宇宙结构本身的活力——如我此前所述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It cannot be considered separately. It may appear in many guises, due to the nature of the particular reality of which it is part, and it involves much more than motion. Action may be considered also simply as the spontaneous nature of the inner vitality toward various expressive materializations.
quotes.translation: 它无法被单独考量。因其所属特定实相的本质，它可能以多种面貌显现，且其内涵远超运动本身。行动亦可被视作内在活力朝向各种表达性物质化的自发本性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What is needed is a basic trust in the nature of vitality, and faith that all elements of experience are used for a greater good, whether or not you can perceive the way in which "evil" is transmuted into creativity. What you love will also be a part of your experience in this life and others.
quotes.translation: 所需的是对活力本质的基本信任，以及相信所有经验元素皆服务于更高善的信念——无论你是否能看清"邪恶"如何转化为创造力。你所爱之物，亦将成为此生及来世经验的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is most difficult for you to contemplate the existence of that which is independent of its own materialization. This vitality fills all other forms while it is itself, in your terms, formless. But our discussions concerning the electrical universe should have led you into intangibles.
quotes.translation: 对你们而言，思考独立于自身物质化之外的存在形态极为困难。这种活力充盈所有其他形态，而它本身——以你们的说法——是无形的。但我们关于电性宇宙的讨论，应已引导你触及那些不可触摸之物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Continue your combined prayer periods. During the time have Ruburt concentrate upon all those other functions of body, organ and mind, that are in excellent condition, quite obviously filled with vitality. This automatically concentrates his attention upon health, which is what you want.
quotes.translation: 继续你们的联合祈祷时段。在此期间，让鲁柏专注于身体、器官和心智中所有其他功能，这些功能状态极佳，显然充满活力。这自然会将其注意力集中在健康上，而这正是你们想要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: And I want you all to know that this is no recording and I have not prepared my lesson ahead of time. I have indeed come for a personal encounter, and to greet our guests and you must admit that for a gentleman as old as I there is some vitality left in me yet. (Very loud in here.)
quotes.translation: 我要你们都知道，这不是录音，我也没有事先准备我的课程。我确实是为了个人会面而来，并向我们的客人致意，你们必须承认，对于像我这样年迈的绅士，我身上仍存有些许活力。（此处声音非常响亮。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I want to show you how form can be changed, even on your own plane, and give you clear examples here so that you will see how in the inner reality universe, vitality can and does change its form at will. This may sound difficult but I hope that it will be plain when I am done.
quotes.translation: 我想向你们展示，即使在你们自己的层面上，形态也可以改变，并在此处给你们清晰的例子，以便你们看到，在内在实相宇宙中，活力能够且确实随意改变其形态。这听起来可能困难，但我希望当我讲完时，它会变得明白易懂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When this method is thoroughly learned and Ruburt allows me greater control, then you shall notice a greater sense of immediacy and vitality. But as I come through to you more clearly in this manner then Ruburt and his own gestures and mannerisms will recede to a like degree.
quotes.translation: 当这种方法被彻底学会，且鲁柏允许我获得更大的控制时，你们便会注意到一种更强烈的即时感和活力。但随着我以这种方式更清晰地来到你们面前，鲁柏及其自身的姿态和习惯动作也会相应地退去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In the same manner, other constructions are affected. It is true that what becomes matter must be dealt with as matter, and yet the inner vitality and the inner self have their own ability to heal. The trouble is, these abilities are little utilized and seldom appreciated.
quotes.translation: 同样地，其他建构也会受到影响。确实，成为物质的东西必须作为物质来处理，然而内在的活力和内在自体拥有它们自己的疗愈能力。问题在于，这些能力很少被利用，也极少被赏识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: Oh yes, this happens in countless cases, and could happen to your plane. It would in no way affect other planes. The vitality on your plane and on or in all planes in your grouping displays itself in terms of self-consciousness to some degree, as you understand it.
quotes.translation: 哦，是的，这在无数案例中发生，也可能发生在你们的层面上。它绝不会影响其他层面。你们层面以及你们所属群体中所有层面上的活力，都会以某种程度的自我意识来展现自己，正如你们所理解的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Egotistically he forced other aspects of his personality to accept what they feared. In times of high vitality the effects were minor. After the book's publication however the effects multiplied. A message to this effect was given him in a dream, and he ignored it.
quotes.translation: 他以自我为中心，强迫自己人格的其他面向接受它们所恐惧的事物。在生命力旺盛时期，这些影响尚属轻微。然而书籍出版后，影响成倍增长。他在梦中收到与此相关的讯息，却置之不理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I do not want Ruburt's psychic energies soaked up in trying to fight these needs, however. We need all of your psychic energies for our work, and you will learn in the future to use these energies well, and also to draw upon energies from the basic vitality.
quotes.translation: 然而，我不希望鲁柏的心智能量被消耗在试图对抗这些需求上。我们需要你全部的心智能量用于我们的工作，未来你将学会善用这些能量，并汲取源自基本生命力的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He can think along these lines for example: "Of course I am healthy. I have excellent digestion, a strong heart. I can feel the vitality of the universe as I breathe in and out. How beautifully my body operates, and I do not even have to think of it."
quotes.translation: 例如他可以这样思考："我当然健康。我有绝佳的消化系统、强健的心脏。当我呼吸时，能感受到宇宙的生命力。我的身体运作如此美妙，甚至无需刻意关注。"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I speak in terms of vertical and horizontal only to make things easier for you. As far as the immediately-previous material is concerned, I let Ruburt in on the vertical so to speak. There was on his part a direct experience of my emotional vitality.
quotes.translation: 我以垂直与水平来表述，仅是为了便于你们理解。就前段资料而言，我让鲁柏得以窥见所谓的垂直面向。他亲身经历了我情感生命力的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The sound, light, and electromagnetic patterns give strength and vitality to the physical form that you recognize. They are more mobile than the physical body, and even more susceptible to the changing pattern of your own thought and emotion.
quotes.translation: 声音、光线与电磁模式，为你所认知的肉体形态注入力量与生命力。它们比肉体更具流动性，甚至更易受你自身思想与情感变化模式的影响。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A healthy overall emotional climate now fills this apartment house, however. If you both learn to keep interruptions under control, you can make the best use of this emotional vitality. For it is, for all its exuberance, a balancing factor.
quotes.translation: 然而，此刻整栋公寓弥漫着健康和谐的情感氛围。若你们学会控制干扰，便能善用这份情感生命力。因为纵使其丰沛洋溢，它始终是平衡的要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They are aware of your egotistical self, but very dimly. You are their environment, so to speak, and they are aware of your health and vitality as it affects them and their own well being. Some are stronger than others. Some are intrusive.
quotes.translation: 他们知道你的自我，但非常模糊。可以说，你是他们的环境，他们能感知到你的健康和活力，因为这会影响他们自身的福祉。有些比其他的更强，有些则具有侵入性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is also a mechanism within the subconscious that allows for the materialization or projection of idea or inner vitality into physical construction. This capacity is inherent even in the atom and molecule and smaller particles.
quotes.translation: 潜意识中也有一种机制，允许观念或内在活力具体化或投射到物质构造中。这种能力甚至存在于原子、分子和更小的粒子中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The whole gains vivid experience through the life of its parts. The whole needs its segments. The vitality must constantly create itself in new patterns and each new pattern, of course, brings forth new possibilities of development.
quotes.translation: 整体通过其部分的生命获得生动的体验。整体需要其片段。活力必须不断以新的模式创造自身，而每个新模式当然会带来新的发展可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is a fluid (Pause), mobile expression of the vitality that you sensed. It will have healing qualities. It absorbs, and yet gives. It shows spontaneity, in an easily-moving manner rather than in an explosive way.
quotes.translation: 这是你所感知到的活力的一种流动的（停顿）、可移动的表达。它将具有疗愈特质。它吸收，同时也给予。它展现出自发性，以一种轻松流动的方式，而非爆发性的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The same hidden ability that promotes your body's health and vitality also fulfills and preserves the world in general. All of this is done playfully, and yet emerges with the greatest display of order and design.
quotes.translation: 同样隐藏的能力，既促进你身体的健康和活力，也普遍维系并保存着这个世界。这一切都以游戏般的方式完成，却呈现出最伟大的秩序与设计。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Your question about transmigration (in Session 903 in Dreams) was an excellent one, and did indeed make the matter clear. It is a temptation at times to use more specific scientific terms, but these would be as confusing as the various definitions and classifications (with humor) that you read in the dictionary, so overall we try to hit a "happy medium." (With more humor.)

quotes.text: There is a continual exchange of energy and vitality, in other words, of actual atoms and molecules between one plane and another.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，能量和活力——即实际的原子和分子——在一个层面与另一个层面之间持续交换。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: With oils again the transparents for the mobility and vitality that gives the form meaning, the opaque's to suggest the idea of physical time, and to suggest the apparent (underlined) duration of form.
quotes.translation: 再次以油彩为例，透明色代表赋予形态意义的流动性与生命力，不透明色则暗示物质时间的概念，以及形态表面（划线强调）的存续性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: They will neutralize the original suggestions. Such patterns, for this is what they are, throw loose and away, break up. The energy that gave them vitality can then be used in new ways.
quotes.translation: 它们将中和最初的暗示。这些模式——因其本质如此——会松散、消散、瓦解。赋予其生命力的能量随后能以新的方式被运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This private multidimensional self, or the soul, has then an eternal validity. It is upheld, supported, maintained by the energy, the inconceivable vitality, of All That Is.
quotes.translation: 这个私密的多维自我，或灵魂，因而具有永恒的效力。它被一切万有的能量、那不可思议的生命力所支撑、维系与维持。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json
